hash_847637a04eef8: ^1Shaw: ^7I wonder...does chaos power this transformation? Is that how it works?
hash_84c637a04f777: ^1Scarlett: ^7If these modifications are anything like the ones on the ship, I think I'll be just fine...
hash_84d637a04f92a: ^1Bruno: ^7These are unnatural forces. We accept their help without question. Sooner or later, this will bite us in the ass.
hash_84e637a04fadd: ^1Diego: ^7Muchas gracias. What happens if I put my clothes in this thing.
hash_ba3496ab22f0e: ^1Bruno: ^7You have been better to me than I deserve.
hash_ba4496ab230c1: ^1Diego: ^7The hero of la Revolucion lives to fight another day!
hash_ba5496ab23274: ^1Shaw: ^7Your Da would be proud of you. Hell, I'm proud of you.
hash_299a6df5904431: ^1Shaw: ^7How does Diego maintain that sultry smile while shooting?
hash_299c6df5904797: ^1Bruno: ^7Nice shot, Mexican. Keep doing that and we may be friends someday.
hash_299d6df590494a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Nice headshot, Diego.     I'm sure we'll hear about it three more times today.
hash_3b02fe6c875b1b: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, fleshies! Uncle Stanton's got your medicine...!
hash_3b05fe6c876034: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, you screamers are gonna be sorry...
hash_3b08fe6c87654d: ^1Bruno: ^7The Viper is angry, and the Dragon is hungry.
hash_3f2a46792a2839: ^1Shaw: ^7Th  at scratch you gave me had better not get infected, or... or...    NYAH!
hash_3f2b46792a29ec: ^1Diego: ^7Hijo de puta, you scratch like a rabid chihuahua!
hash_3f2c46792a2b9f: ^1Bruno: ^7Dull creature. No thought for its actions.
hash_5559504fa1a140: ^1Diego: ^7Great. Now I am itching all over.
hash_555a504fa1a2f3: ^1Bruno: ^7*nnf* Whole...body...is...clenching... Like a...cramp...from head to toe.
hash_555b504fa1a4a6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay, that one just smells like a fart someone caught in a jar.     Stanton...?!
hash_5560504fa1ad25: ^1Shaw: ^7Smells like...bitter almonds?! oh, dear, that's cyanide! That's--    Wait. This is more like sour almonds. Never mind.
hash_b74d61592e7deb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Anyone see that?! Please tell me you saw that.
hash_b74f61592e8151: ^1Diego: ^7Chakrams, where have you been all my life?
hash_b75061592e8304: ^1Shaw: ^7Where did Alistair find these things? Never mind, I don't care!
hash_d3a42337b4a7a8: ^1Shaw: ^7Vengeance is mine! But I'd give my loin cloth for a drop of laudanum.
hash_d3a92337b4b027: ^1Scarlett: ^7Finish what you start, slackjaw! Great life lesson if you weren't, y'know, already dead.
hash_d3ab2337b4b38d: ^1Diego: ^7There! Are you sorry for what you did?
hash_e255c763ecdff6: ^1Shaw: ^7If I'm under the influence of, ahem, whatever, shouldn't I just be able to imagine stronger boards?
hash_e257c763ece35c: ^1Bruno: ^7We will be overwhelmed again if we do nothing to prepare.
hash_e258c763ece50f: ^1Diego: ^7Why am I even doing this? Surely there is better use for my time and talents.
hash_e25ac763ece875: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll take every precious second I can buy.

hash_1a0eec0a9897f2f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Neither do you Bruno. Neither do you.
hash_1a17371a386b130: ^1Bruno: ^7Merci, strange device. I have given up trying to figure out how any of this works.
hash_1a17471a386b2e3: ^1Diego: ^7The powers that create this are beyond my understanding, but powerful weapons? Those I understand.
hash_1a17671a386b649: ^1Scarlett: ^7This'll work. The audience might even get a kick out of it.
hash_1a17971a386bb62: ^1Shaw: ^7This weapon-enhancing device looks similar to the one of the ship. Is it the same one? Or is there a factory somewhere just shitting out these things?
hash_20290b748a45190: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, I guess this was bound to happen sooner or later.
hash_20295b748a45a0f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Dammit! It can't end now. Not like this!
hash_20296b748a45bc2: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, perhaps I deserve this. But the greater punishment is to fight on.
hash_20297b748a45d75: ^1Diego: ^7Well. This is not going to be in the next Diego novel, that much is certain.
hash_252010c100edbe8: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to cash in, people! Bang-bang, ching-ching!
hash_252070c100ee61a: ^1Bruno: ^7The phrase "making a killing" was never more appropriate.
hash_25cb57f47a5b823: ^1Shaw: ^7Quickly! Someone else! Take this! I don't need it!
hash_25cbb7f47a5c255: ^1Bruno: ^7I am not the one for this weapon. Perhaps another will claim it.
hash_27c051ecbabfceb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Who's got two guns and doesn't like getting backed into a corner? This gal.
hash_27c061ecbabfe9e: ^1Bruno: ^7Standing my ground here is just bad tactics.
hash_27c071ecbac0051: ^1Diego: ^7Tell me -- and be honest -- did one of you fart?
hash_27c081ecbac0204: ^1Shaw: ^7I seem to be getting popular here. The belle of the fucking ball.
hash_29dad0dadb44771: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aw, put a cork in it! the headwound, I mean.
hash_29db00dadb44c8a: ^1Shaw: ^7Whoops. I only meant to take a little off the top...
hash_2acff86386d0677: ^1Diego: ^7The creatures in this coliseum are even more fearsome and ferocious than those we faced before.     Perhaps we should both watch over Scarlett and Shaw...?
hash_2b85059c5d20365: ^1Shaw: ^7Ta, poppet. Good to know you're looking out for me.
hash_2ba1c30fa2109f4: ^1Diego: ^7Patience, Viper. You and Dragon will get to play soon enough.
hash_2ba1e30fa210d5a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Dragon's locked and loaded. Viper's ready to strike.
hash_367563f9dd1e034: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, you dead-brains! Let's give the crowd something to cheer about!
hash_36c62ddd36e79d6: ^1Shaw: ^7That's enough groveling! You're almost as bad as I used to be.    Never get married.
hash_36c64ddd36e7d3c: ^1Bruno: ^7You were begging for help. I knew only one solution.
hash_36c65ddd36e7eef: ^1Diego: ^7Live like a babosa. Die like a babosa.
hash_36c67ddd36e8255: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't need anyone scratching my boots.
hash_379a16a53bc4ebf: Press ^3[{+smoke}]^7 to switch to Brazen Bull
hash_3a12d2ab2290869: ^1Shaw: ^7Okay... I think we would all benefit from a little... snifter.     Whatever you may say about my 'indulgences', an elixir works wonders in certain circumstances.
hash_3c857b92fba9730: ^1Diego: ^7I am not normally a whip-guy, but I can be convinced.
hash_3effe96e10c4e49: ^1Diego: ^7We have to do better than this.
hash_404d5e1f078b740: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno, they love you! And by "love" I mean they are about to drag you down.
hash_404dce1f078c325: ^1Shaw: ^7Fort Bruno is under siege. Time to quit the castle, I'd say.
hash_40bcb106b60a6bc: ^1Diego: ^7Senorita Rhodes, you are a force of nature!
hash_45813a1d60a08e7: ^1Shaw: ^7A  trunk-monster?? Well this is just grand!
hash_48f14fac5074eca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Your dumb face aside - We've got more important things to worry about than how we look.      Has 'The World's Greatest Spy' spied anything useful?
hash_4c1170e86201ea1: ^1Shaw: ^7No ammo? Well, fuck me. I'll be back in a tick, worm-brains!
hash_4c1180e86202054: ^1Diego: ^7Okay, fantasma, I'm all out of bullets!    Hey, I thought we had a deal! Where's my ammo??
hash_4c1190e86202207: ^1Bruno: ^7Try to stay positive, bruno. An empty weapon is an opportunity to find a better one.     One with bullets.
hash_4ca0531410ec73b: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm going to take down that big axe-hole. Anyone care to pitch in?
hash_4ca0831410ecc54: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well if it ain't the Tin Woodsman.
hash_4ca0b31410ed16d: ^1Bruno: ^7Somebody help me chop this one down.
hash_4d8bd3e22867276: ^1Shaw: ^7I'd keep its tongue for study, but there's not enough formaldehyde in the world.
hash_4d8bf3e228675dc: ^1Bruno: ^7This all seems so pointless. Except for killing you. That always feels right.
hash_4d8c03e2286778f: ^1Diego: ^7My novelist will never believe this one. Ah, well, "stranger than fiction."
hash_4d8c23e22867af5: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'd rather be dead than look like you. And it seems you agree.
hash_52dfdfd5279c3f8: ^1Shaw: ^7More of these big, jumpy blokes? Makes me tired just seeing them flex and pounce...
hash_52e02fd5279cc77: ^1Scarlett: ^7These knife-hand guys hate me. You'd think I shot their dog or something!
hash_52e03fd5279ce2a: ^1Bruno: ^7The angry ones are the type I hated working with back in Paris.    Always rushing in blindly, leaving bodies in their wake.
hash_52e04fd5279cfdd: ^1Diego: ^7Ay, bendito. Another jumping bean? There is only so much Diego to go around!
hash_573b450e87a2e2c: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least he's useful, the sexist little runt.
hash_576d216f2ff541a: ^1Diego: ^7Look at that knife-work -- so smooth, so confident!
hash_5deb4836e95dc28: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tigers. Undead fucking tigers. *sigh* Sure, why not?
hash_5deb6836e95df8e: ^1Diego: ^7I hate cats. Especially dead ones who don't have the good sense to stay down.
hash_5deb7836e95e141: ^1Bruno: ^7I had to shoot a tiger once. Clearly, I am still paying for this crime.
hash_5deb9836e95e4a7: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, there's something you don't see every day. Well, I do, but most people don't...

hash_664034956897a68: ^1Diego: ^7Impressive shot, miss Rhodes! Messy, but impressive.
hash_664044956897c1b: ^1Bruno: ^7I always trained my men to shoot for the head. This comes naturally to Scarlett.
hash_6640a495689864d: ^1Shaw: ^7I think the crowd is impressed, Scarlett! I know I am.
hash_681963047e2efb8: ^1Bruno: ^7I swear, camel piss would taste better than this.
hash_681973047e2f16b: ^1Diego: ^7This seems backwards. The medicinal elixir--    Is making me sick.
hash_681993047e2f4d1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Give me strength. Or at least a stronger stomach...
hash_6819c3047e2f9ea: ^1Shaw: ^7Now, what did I make that one out of? Is that a hint of pituitary gland I detect?
hash_68298d258e67dcd: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you saw strange markings, why didn't you point them out to Shaw?? He is our 'linguistics' expert after all.
hash_68810350edb4e1e: ^1Bruno: ^7No, Scarlett. You will not perish before I do. I could not live with that.
hash_68811350edb4fd1: ^1Diego: ^7Do not worry, jefa. You can return the favor later, I am sure.
hash_68812350edb5184: ^1Shaw: ^7You're feeling better, yes? Good. I wasn't sure which hypo I used there.
hash_698eb4b86790b88: ^1Diego: ^7YES! Forgive my excitement, I am just very much aware of what I could have received.
hash_698ec4b86790d3b: ^1Bruno: ^7On this occasion you have not wronged me, Box.
hash_698ed4b86790eee: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm just glad the walking corpses don't have guns, too...
hash_698f24b8679176d: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't you have anything smaller? But also more powerful?
hash_6ee809396504721: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't know if everyone's aware, but there's a name for this. He's a "Homunculus."
hash_6ee8193965048d4: ^1Diego: ^7Come, my vicious little friend. We are going to have fun, you and I.
hash_6ee829396504a87: ^1Bruno: ^7To be so ugly is a curse you may deserve.
hash_6ee839396504c3a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just try no to wriggle too much until I throw you, okay?
hash_7a7bf9496fc93e1: ^1Shaw: ^7Hot lead and cold flesh. My kind of chemistry.
hash_7a7c09496fc9594: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, my Dragon! Send them back to Hell!
hash_7a7c19496fc9747: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not want to enjoy this.    But I must confess I do.
hash_7aba0cbbeeb3608: ^1Shaw: ^7"Stand up to bullies!" that's what mum used to say!     I got the fucking shit kicked out of me.
hash_7aba7cbbeeb41ed: ^1Diego: ^7Meh! I do not listen to critics.

hash_81f6afdf9269f59: ^1Shaw: ^7The Pharaoh's sarcophagus! Hopefully nobody's in there. We've quite enough Nec-ro-tins scampering about the place already!
hash_81f6bfdf926a10c: ^1Diego: ^7That is a lot of gold...    I'm sure no one will notice if a 'little' goes missing...
hash_81f6cfdf926a2bf: ^1Bruno: ^7Even in death the Wealthy cling to their spoils. Putains de voleurs.
hash_81f6dfdf926a472: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like the Pharaoh's trying to buy his way into heaven.     Reminds me of someone.

hash_8aa954731482a90: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know what medicine Shaw took, but it's got him all riled up.
hash_8aa974731482df6: ^1Diego: ^7Okay, Shaw, challenge accepted! I cannot let you have all the glory today!
hash_8aa984731482fa9: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not know if it is luck or skill that keeps Shaw alive. Then again, who cares?
hash_9272af5d93cafd8: ^1Shaw: ^7You trying to break some sort of record, Bruno?
hash_92a8bcbf4bac750: ^1Bruno: ^7Why bloody the hands when a machine will do? It is like one of those modern farms.
hash_92a8ccbf4bac903: ^1Diego: ^7This thing is downright medieval! Me gusta.
hash_92a8ecbf4bacc69: ^1Scarlett: ^7It may be made to shred men alive, but the craftsmanship is kind of stunning for the time period.
hash_931dba8d83156b8: ^1Bruno: ^7You deal me a weapon, I go deal death. And on and on it goes...
hash_931dca8d831586b: ^1Diego: ^7When buying a weapon from a wall is the most normal part of your day, you know your day
hash_931dea8d8315bd1: ^1Scarlett: ^7The rot-jockeys don't know how to use these walls...do they?
hash_931e1a8d83160ea: ^1Shaw: ^7Cheers, wall! Nice to get what I paid for.    Unlike that blasted box.
hash_936e02e9ec4001b: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've come too far and lost too much to die in this hellhole.
hash_936e12e9ec401ce: ^1Bruno: ^7I swore to sell my life dearly. You monsters haven't paid enough yet.
hash_936e22e9ec40381: ^1Diego: ^7Okay. As my friend Pancho Villa likes to say, "Caca just got real."
hash_936e32e9ec40534: ^1Shaw: ^7You can't keep a good chemist down. Or me, for that matter.
hash_9777b59b7388906: ^1Shaw: ^7Well that's a rare bright spot in my day.
hash_9778059b7389185: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's not much, but I'll take it.
hash_9b98137ec7cd136: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to contribute to this player's challenges [Cost: 2500]
hash_a25e75541e63ae7: ^1Diego: ^7Hijo de su madre! If this disgusting creature can do that, I will suppress the need to vomit!
hash_a411c19dd6ae233: ^1Diego: ^7I kind of wish the Oracle had given us a little more of an idea what to expect.     Ahh, But I do love a woman who is mysterious.
hash_a57efeec61b5a4e: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Poison the Mystery Box
hash_a5e14e0492270f0: ^1Shaw: ^7I need this. For later.     You'll see.
hash_a5e1be049227cd5: ^1Diego: ^7One day at a party, I shall regale a senorita with the tale of "That One Time I Picked Up a Thing"...
hash_a8bcad309c710cb: ^1Diego: ^7A word to the wise: do not stand in front of me once I squeeze this trigger.
hash_a8bccd309c71431: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay. Now I'm in the big leagues.
hash_a8bcfd309c7194a: ^1Shaw: ^7"L.M.G." Stands for Light Machine Gun, right?    Who in their right mind thinks this thing is "light"?!
hash_ae96a732a83a0e6: ^1Shaw: ^7This reminds me of that time in a Paris brothel, when I...    What? Don't you judge me, I'm saving your life!
hash_ae96d732a83a5ff: ^1Diego: ^7This is no time for a break, Bruno. Get back to work.
hash_ae96f732a83a965: ^1Scarlett: ^7No shame in getting knocked down. After all, you're a pretty big target.

hash_afbb13966faa49c: ^1Diego: ^7Come, my darling. Let us dance the Pasodoble. And kill everything in sight, of course.
hash_afbb23966faa64f: ^1Bruno: ^7Welcome, my friend, to the war that never ends...
hash_b07fc9e18444e19: ^1Shaw: ^7These ancient societies, they squandered the prima materia -- the raw chaos. They used it up!     Thought it was all gone. Until the Titanic, that is...
hash_b07fd9e18444fcc: ^1Diego: ^7Have we literally traveled back in time? Or does the vapor make us relive the lives of others? If I can't tell the difference, does it matter?
hash_b07fe9e1844517f: ^1Bruno: ^7I know Alistair yet lives. He would not die before I could repay the debt I owe.
hash_b07ff9e18445332: ^1Scarlett: ^7Dad better still be alive. If I've missed my chance to give him hell for all of this, well...I'm gonna kill whoever killed him.
hash_b37c119b943a068: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey, this one smells like the market in Morrocco! It smells like...life.
hash_b37c219b943a21b: ^1Diego: ^7One has to remember to stop and smell the roses.     I would give anything for some roses right now.
hash_b37c419b943a581: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yes. I feel the power coursing through my limbs! Always a good sign.
hash_b37c719b943aa9a: ^1Shaw: ^7Word to the wise: hold it in as long as you can.     Oh, my poor, wasted lungs...

hash_c1824eeb3018a73: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh yes, flame jets from the ground! Neat parlor trick. Love it. Honestly.
hash_c1826eeb3018dd9: ^1Diego: ^7Ha! There is something in the flames, can you see it? There are symbols!    And yes, I've taken magic drugs, I know!
hash_c1827eeb3018f8c: ^1Shaw: ^7WATCH OUT- open fire! Crikey! I  nearly roasted my chestnuts!
hash_c691b5ec7f99c53: ^1Shaw: ^7This overgrown pestle hits more like a mortar.
hash_c691e5ec7f9a16c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just the tool to fix you broken brain-eaters!
hash_c69215ec7f9a685: ^1Bruno: ^7Zut alors, this thing hits like a cannonball--!
hash_c75d4ff018f5483: ^1Shaw: ^7That's quite enough out of you! And you! And you! Hell, the whole lot of you!
hash_c75d7ff018f599c: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's plenty of bullets for the rest of ya!
hash_c75d9ff018f5d02: ^1Diego: ^7Are dominos invented yet? Because I am knocking them down like...well, you know.
hash_c75daff018f5eb5: ^1Bruno: ^7Each kill here is an act of mercy. And I am most merciful today.
hash_c8f23e9bd8a34e3: ^1Bruno: ^7Wait your turn, monstre. I will get to you all.
hash_c8f24e9bd8a3696: ^1Scarlett: ^7Gonna shove that claw down your throat if you try that again.
hash_c8f29e9bd8a3f15: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, that hurt! Laudanum must be wearing off.
hash_c9ff18e714d3d00: ^1Scarlett: ^7If we can solve all their riddles and defeat all their 'warriors', then the doorway will be opened.      Why did he have to be right? Why did he have to be telling the truth?!

hash_cad365961f97049: ^1Shaw: ^7Quit faffing about, Diego. Don't you know there's a war on?
hash_cad385961f973af: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey, hero of the revolution, get up off your ass.
hash_cad395961f97562: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tell me your near-death experience has changed you.
hash_cf1b9903da2c213: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not bad for a man your age, Shaw!
hash_cf1ba903da2c3c6: ^1Bruno: ^7I think Shaw's finger just slipped on the trigger. It worked out quite well.
hash_cf1bb903da2c579: ^1Diego: ^7You might make a fine soldier one day, Shaw! Now show us you can do that again!
hash_d05f7d2a28104eb: ^1Bruno: ^7They are closing in on you, Mexican!    In case you did not notice.
hash_d05fdd2a2810f1d: ^1Shaw: ^7Aw, look: they all want to embrace our Latin lover...     Oh, shit! Run, Diego, run!
hash_d0a7fcaf06772bc: ^1Scarlett: ^7Then suddenly - He's gone. And I'm bouncing from relative to relative, care home to care home, sister to sister.
hash_d15f8edff2fba63: ^1Shaw: ^7Got the morbs again, do you? I've got just the thing for that.
hash_d15fbedff2fbf7c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, big guy. I need you watching my back.
hash_d15fdedff2fc2e2: ^1Diego: ^7Your wound will heal, amigo, but I'm afraid that face of yours is permanent.
hash_d19a5e2d0551672: ^1Bruno: ^7More bullets, more bloodshed. This is my life. You are welcome to it.

hash_d47dd769562c65c: ^1Shaw: ^7All right, you big buffoon, once more, with feeling.
hash_d539de001117b3e: ^1Shaw: ^7Keep sending more, I'll keep sending 'em back in pieces!
hash_d539fe001117ea4: ^1Bruno: ^7You did this to yourselves, monstres! I did not want any of this!
hash_d53a0e001118057: ^1Diego: ^7I've often dreamed of fighting in an ancient arena. It's going just as I expected.
hash_d98c6b44d2d145b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't see anything in Dad's letter about running about of ammo.
hash_d98c8b44d2d17c1: ^1Diego: ^7And that, bestias, is why you always count your bullets.     Not that you use guns, gracias a Dios.
hash_d98c9b44d2d1974: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, bullets, you're always leaving me. I should just start calling you "Evelyn."
hash_dcc6f6a9d2dfbac: ^1Bruno: ^7In this battle, against such an enemy, I think we must exploit every advantage we have.     However... Unnatural.
hash_dd6daac67d10818: ^1Diego: ^7The Chemist is racking up quite a kill-count. Looks like I have to step up my game.
hash_dd6dbac67d109cb: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey, Shaw! Whatever "medicine" you took, stick with that prescription!
hash_dd6dcac67d10b7e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Pace yourself, Shaw! This is a marathon, not a sprint!
hash_e0bb96fcfc6fb47: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll cut through all of you rot-jockey jerks!
hash_e3a7679f5a7e02b: ^1Scarlett: ^7You know what? You can send as many of those as you want.
hash_e3a7779f5a7e1de: ^1Bruno: ^7I hear your screams. The join a choir of others...
hash_e3a7879f5a7e391: ^1Diego: ^7Where can I lay my hands on a whole bag of those particular explosives?
hash_e4bec52d916c298: ^1Bruno: ^7If limberger cheese...and rancid cabbage...had a stillborn baby...it would not smell half as vile.
hash_e4bed52d916c44b: ^1Diego: ^7I once tracked an enemy through ten miles of Mexico City sewer.    Smelled better than this.
hash_e4bf252d916ccca: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that is rank. I swear I can actually taste maggots...!     An undead biological weapon. Fascinating.
hash_e67660e78e449f6: ^1Diego: ^7Let's be honest: I should always get double points, just for being me.
hash_e67670e78e44ba9: ^1Bruno: ^7Do you expect me to say, "thank you"?
hash_e67690e78e44f0f: ^1Shaw: ^7Sounds good. Although, double pints sounds even better.
hash_e87782f24df0e86: ^1Diego: ^7Bravo, Scarlett! I could watch you fight all day long.    What? Did that sound creepy?
hash_e87792f24df1039: ^1Bruno: ^7You would have been at home in the Foreign Legion, mademoiselle!     Ah...if we accepted mademoiselles.
hash_e877b2f24df139f: ^1Shaw: ^7It's all right, Scarlett! They can't feel pain!    ...or maybe they can!     At this point, who really cares?
hash_ea994ed8cecd770: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn. Even one-armed, they just keep coming.
hash_ea996ed8cecdad6: ^1Diego: ^7Piece by piece, monster, I will take you apart.
hash_ea997ed8cecdc89: ^1Bruno: ^7Just when I thought you could not look worse.
hash_ea999ed8cecdfef: ^1Shaw: ^7One arm gone. Stumbling around  like a drunkard at last call. And still you come.
hash_eb15ca3dff8233e: ^1Bruno: ^7So here I am, lost in antiquity, killing dead men with a bug.     Fuck my life...
hash_eb15da3dff824f1: ^1Diego: ^7He has quite a sting, no?    Someone please wake me from this nightmare.
hash_eb15ea3dff826a4: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, you must excuse Teddy! A scorpion of his size gets a bit... backed up, you see.
hash_eb1cb5f1fc5198c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Dad better still be alive. If I've missed my chance to yell at him for all of this, well...I'm gonna kill whoever killed him.
hash_ee73eab5a1ab81b: ^1Diego: ^7Let me know if you need a hand, Bruno -- though I would advise a swift retreat.
hash_ee740ab5a1abb81: ^1Scarlett: ^7Watch it, Bruno! They're swarming you, and we need you alive!
hash_ee743ab5a1ac09a: ^1Shaw: ^7You're in a tight spot there, Bruno. My advice? Get the fuck out.
hash_ef3364b12eac180: ^1Diego: ^7SANTO MIERDA! We are all going to die!
hash_ef3374b12eac333: ^1Bruno: ^7Mon dieu... What have they done to you, poor beast?
hash_efd20879ad5f0e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7What's in this for you, wall? Why are you helping us?
hash_efd22879ad5f446: ^1Diego: ^7Let's put on a good show for my adoring fans!
hash_efd23879ad5f5f9: ^1Bruno: ^7We must embrace this dark magique. I only hope it does not cost us.
hash_efd25879ad5f95f: ^1Shaw: ^7These walls appear to be working together, setting the prices...    Stingy bastards! They've cornered the market!
hash_f1737aff2342c2d: ^1Shaw: ^7Now, I have question for you Scarlett - You and your father are 'somewhat estranged', but you do seem REALLY invested in finding him.     Why?
hash_f2a1414993e8f41: ^1Shaw: ^7Yay for Shaw! But save the laurels and wine for after I'm through shitting myself!
hash_f2a1514993e90f4: ^1Diego: ^7This highest praise, I accept with the utmost humility...
hash_f2a1614993e92a7: ^1Bruno: ^7Call me hero! Call me sauvage! I do not give fuck!
hash_f2a1714993e945a: ^1Scarlett: ^7The love of the crowd... Almost makes all this horrific shit we have to go through worth it.
hash_f3554705f9eaa40: ^1Diego: ^7How could I deprive the crowd of their favorite Mexican gladiator?
hash_f3555705f9eabf3: ^1Bruno: ^7I have died before. I am in no hurry to do so again.
hash_f3556705f9eada6: ^1Scarlett: ^7No way am I sitting out the rest of this.
hash_f3971b3e0185fb4: ^1Scarlett: ^7What do these things need money for anyway?
hash_f49a32df290da98: ^1Diego: ^7Not as elegant as a saber, but elegance is overrated.
hash_f49a42df290dc4b: ^1Bruno: ^7This blade was made for butchers. Sadly, that includes moi.
hash_f49a52df290ddfe: ^1Scarlett: ^7They can have their swords and spears. I'm more than ready if things get stabby...
hash_f49aa2df290e67d: ^1Shaw: ^7Eh, the blade looks sharp, but I'll have to run a few tests. That's just science.
hash_f6cd7d109f7e783: ^1Shaw: ^7Such power from an arachnid...    Some naughty crawly's gotten into the prima materia, hasn't he? Oh, yes he did...
hash_f6cdad109f7ec9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well it's effective! *Creepy* as all hell, but yeah -- effective!
hash_f6cdcd109f7f002: ^1Diego: ^7Sorry to squeeze you, devil scorpion. *Please* do not squirt out babies...
hash_f6cddd109f7f1b5: ^1Bruno: ^7Hoo! Let us hope the scorpion never  breaks his chains...

hash_fb1ab58ba400777: ^1Bruno: ^7True. I have seen - and done - far worse. On one occasion I removed a rival's eyeballs using only a rusted dessert spoon... He screamed for his mother the entire time.     You okay, Shaw? You have gone a bit pale.
hash_fc630395d5d3cdb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Great. An angry little man. Just what I need.
hash_fc632395d5d4041: ^1Diego: ^7So pale. So angry. I think you  were cooped up in that box far too long.
hash_fc633395d5d41f4: ^1Shaw: ^7Whoever put you together must have been in a hurry. They were probably  going out somewhere.
hash_ff74b7b5a7539fe: ^1Shaw: ^7Ha! Tougher than I look, eh? Nine stone of bone and gristle here.
hash_ff74d7b5a753d64: ^1Bruno: ^7You screamers keep trying to provoke me...and it keeps working.
hash_ff74e7b5a753f17: ^1Diego: ^7How dare you?! I overthrew a government and liberated a nation. Who are you to claw me?
hash_10168133ee9f3c72: ^1Scarlett: ^7My father - and the people to took him... And do you know what, Diego?     Both of them better have their answers ready.

hash_10364b5a8f6536cf: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, my adoring fans! Stanton Shaw has returned! I know, I'm not really here and you're not really cheering for me... but I don't care, this is my hallucination!
hash_10456dc4a84cde80: ^1Diego: ^7No ammo? Mami would be very disappointed.
hash_10456ec4a84ce033: ^1Bruno: ^7I am no stranger to running out of ammo in the middle of a battle.    But, yes, it is always embarrassing.
hash_10456fc4a84ce1e6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm out of ammo. Can't say I didn't see this coming.
hash_104574c4a84cea65: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! Just where the hell did all my ammo get to??
hash_10ab5b8d829b4340: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, sure -- pick on the sickly one, why don't you?
hash_10ab618d829b4d72: ^1Bruno: ^7You are making me angry. That is a fatal mistake.
hash_10ab628d829b4f25: ^1Diego: ^7Well, that was careless of me. And suicidal of you.
hash_10bf838ac227513b: ^1Shaw: ^7I do worry a bit about damaging the surrounding architecture. This site is a GOLDMINE!
hash_10bf868ac2275654: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not bad, Box - not bad at all.
hash_10bf888ac22759ba: ^1Diego: ^7Diego is going hunting now. Try to stay out of the way.
hash_10bf898ac2275b6d: ^1Bruno: ^7Their flesh is weak. This weapon is strong.

hash_10f0155994b41648: ^1Scarlett: ^7Is this too much gun for me?     Naw. This is just right.
hash_10f0175994b419ae: ^1Diego: ^7I am not overcompensating. I am just taking sensible precautions.
hash_10f0185994b41b61: ^1Bruno: ^7This is so far ahead of even the new British guns. Where do they come from?
hash_10f01a5994b41ec7: ^1Shaw: ^7This thing looks like a gun-lover's dream. And a ghoul's worst nightmare.
hash_1197f9cf9ed5aa28: ^1Diego: ^7How many of these gladiators are there? Was this a gladiator school?
hash_1197facf9ed5abdb: ^1Bruno: ^7Over here, you dumb ox! Let me help you shed that armor.
hash_1197fbcf9ed5ad8e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't know how many more of these bruisers I can take...
hash_119800cf9ed5b60d: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, we're popular. Especially with those armored stonkers.
hash_11ef3279fd14a550: ^1Diego: ^7Don't worry, cuco, I'll aim higher next time.
hash_11ef3479fd14a8b6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hate these crawlers. Half as dangerous but twice as disgusting.
hash_11ef3979fd14b135: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on you poor legless sod, just fucking die! You're depressing the hell out of me!
hash_11f4614813f73530: ^1Shaw: ^7Squirrely little imp, isn't he? But he gets the job done!
hash_11fac8358d3a8943: ^1Shaw: ^7Ha! Who needs pharmaceuticals when you can do this?!
hash_11facb358d3a8e5c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well, if you have to knock 'em dead, this is the right tool for it.
hash_11facd358d3a91c2: ^1Diego: ^7*tsk-tsk* Dragon, do not get jealous. Just let Viper do her thing.
hash_11face358d3a9375: ^1Bruno: ^7Silence their cries, Viper! End their pain.
hash_11fed6818ebd4803: ^1Shaw: ^7If this works like the ship...then I got some more killing to do.
hash_11fed9818ebd4d1c: ^1Scarlett: ^7No, no, I get the racket you're running here. Doesn't mean I'm happy about it.
hash_11fedb818ebd5082: ^1Diego: ^7This is not really about money, is it? This is about forcing us to kill more.
hash_11fedc818ebd5235: ^1Bruno: ^7The odds are stacked against us. And this game is rigged.
hash_1207a71dfc7f4a9e: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't worry, I haven't lost a patient yet. That you know of.
hash_1207a91dfc7f4e04: ^1Bruno: ^7The next time you want to ridicule me, just remember who saved your derriere.
hash_1207ac1dfc7f531d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I better not read in your next dime novel that you saved me, comprende?
hash_120c6bbb3cf45100: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair said he'd found you very useful, Bruno. I can see why.
hash_120c70bb3cf4597f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Y'know, Bruno, when you're not over-thinking things, you're kind of unstoppable!
hash_120c72bb3cf45ce5: ^1Diego: ^7You are a natural, my French amigo!
hash_126439cffc41e409: ^1Shaw: ^7Strewth! Who the blazes threw tha...    Right. It was me.
hash_12643acffc41e5bc: ^1Diego: ^7Gladiators used explosives, yes? Ah, si, estoy seguro... It's not cheating.
hash_1272d749b87d0700: ^1Diego: ^7Rarely does so much fury come in such a small package.
hash_1272d849b87d08b3: ^1Bruno: ^7When channeled correctly, anger can be very useful.
hash_1272d949b87d0a66: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, you're gonna fit right in. Everyone here is ugly as sin.
hash_1272de49b87d12e5: ^1Shaw: ^7A face only a mother could love. Even then she'd probably have to be blind.
hash_128b0c878b3b08e7: ^1Diego: ^7Do not fight all of them at once, Shaw!
hash_128b0e878b3b0c4d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Uncle Stan, this is not a drill! Get clear of that swarm now!
hash_12924daa0584a798: ^1Shaw: ^7I'll never look at a giraffe the same way again.
hash_129252aa0584b017: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aw, no. I still have nightmares about these Blightfather guys.
hash_129253aa0584b1ca: ^1Bruno: ^7Whatever ends up killing me today, please do not let it be that thing.
hash_129254aa0584b37d: ^1Diego: ^7¬°Oye! ¬°Padre de Plaga! Back for more humiliation?
hash_12ae8957853edfc6: ^1Bruno: ^7More currency, more weapons, more bloodsport. I hope someone is enjoying this...
hash_12ae8b57853ee32c: ^1Shaw: ^7I never was good with money, but I'm sinking this straight into munitions futures.
hash_12c3605d43d5e283: ^1Shaw: ^7Hold still, good sir, while I lance that boil on your neck...
hash_12c3635d43d5e79c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, yeah. I'm gonna pop all your balloons.
hash_12c3655d43d5eb02: ^1Diego: ^7Shoot the lumps on his back! Let's do this!
hash_12c3665d43d5ecb5: ^1Bruno: ^7You have been a pain in the neck to us. Allow me to return the favor.
hash_12c5351a0f58f573: ^1Diego: ^7Pick up one thing. Then another. And another. Before you know it, BAM! Your pantalones fall down.
hash_12c5371a0f58f8d9: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's something to this. I can feel it.
hash_12c53a1a0f58fdf2: ^1Shaw: ^7What are you for, little trinket? Better be something good.
hash_12f182ac2d46eee1: ^1Bruno: ^7Call me hero! Call me sauvage! I do not care!
hash_12f9edb86e6ba05d: Slide under a Blade Trap without taking damage
hash_1304e82f9aab64e6: ^1Diego: ^7Careful, my French amigo -- a few more head-shots and we will have to crown you champion.
hash_1304eb2f9aab69ff: ^1Shaw: ^7That's right, Bruno! Keep popping their skulls! And keep them far from me!
hash_13226667ec58e080: ^1Bruno: ^7I almost feel sorry for these beasts.
hash_13226767ec58e233: ^1Diego: ^7You hear that? It is the sound of your doom.
hash_13226c67ec58eab2: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that feels quite reassuring, so it does.
hash_1354af92e864254c: Zeus Basement to Tunnel Gate Opened!
hash_1393a973af6d2418: ^1Diego: ^7That reminds me: Scarlett? Are you paying us? Or is this strictly "keep what you take"?
hash_1393aa73af6d25cb: ^1Bruno: ^7Why points? Why money? Why does this massacre have an economy?
hash_1393ab73af6d277e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Trust me - I know how math works.
hash_1393b073af6d2ffd: ^1Shaw: ^7Who says I never have two pennies to rub together?
hash_13a077822f2edfe0: ^1Shaw: ^7Evelyn always told me I'd let everyone down.
hash_13a07c822f2ee85f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Can't say we didn't fuck that up.
hash_13a07d822f2eea12: ^1Bruno: ^7I am getting angry. I do like being angry. It only makes me angrier.
hash_13aea7fc104dac40: ^1Scarlett: ^7Always wanted a standing ovation! Too bad I'm covered in blood.
hash_13aea9fc104dafa6: ^1Diego: ^7What an audience! Shame they are bat-shit loco.
hash_13aeaafc104db159: ^1Bruno: ^7This is my hell! This is where I belong!
hash_13aeacfc104db4bf: ^1Shaw: ^7Ohh if the enemy could see me now!
hash_13c12a748b74093e: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you see that one's face? It was hideous! And now it's just...gone.
hash_13c12d748b740e57: ^1Diego: ^7There was something on its face. My bullet brushed it off.
hash_1442971d74c38a1c: ^1Bruno: ^7Scarlett - I know of your father's experiences with the 'supernatural' first hand. I know of his resolve.    I believe he is still alive.
hash_1487cf3419ac809e: ^1Shaw: ^7"Insta-Kill." Sounds thoroughly modern, like "instant coffee."    Though you wouldn't want to get the two confused.
hash_1487d23419ac85b7: ^1Diego: ^7Do not be shy, muertos. Diego has something for you.
hash_1487d43419ac891d: ^1Scarlett: ^7You hear that? Let's clear 'em out while we can!

hash_16864f32c9b0c9f8: ^1Diego: ^7Tell me I am still unblemished. No need -- I see it in your eyes.
hash_16865032c9b0cbab: ^1Bruno: ^7You did it, Shaw. You saved my life!
hash_16865132c9b0cd5e: ^1Scarlett: ^7No awkward hugs. Let's just get back to it.
hash_16c738ef60d8ecfb: ^1Shaw: ^7Nice! You know, I'd get even more headshots if these wankers could just walk properly.
hash_16c73bef60d8f214: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't even think about getting back up.
hash_16c73def60d8f57a: ^1Diego: ^7Sorry about your brain, but you were not really using it, anyway...
hash_16c73eef60d8f72d: ^1Bruno: ^7Your screams may be silenced, but the others still howl.
hash_16cd8cc632b6907b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah...I think I'm about to feel a whole lot better.
hash_16cd8dc632b6922e: ^1Bruno: ^7Do you not have something bigger? Peut etre un...trebuchet?

hash_171cff2c50522d0b: ^1Bruno: ^7I think I have smelled this scent before. Digging latrines.
hash_171d002c50522ebe: ^1Scarlett: ^7*gags* Is it possible to distill a skunk? Because I'm pretty sure someone tried.

hash_172fd7bb68c3ee43: ^1Shaw: ^7Max ammo! Oh, that does has a lovely ring to it. Nice and simple. Does what it says on the tin.
hash_172fdcbb68c3f6c2: ^1Diego: ^7During the revolution, we melted down cooking pots, silverware, even bedpans to make bullets.    All should be thoroughly cleaned beforehand.
hash_172fddbb68c3f875: ^1Bruno: ^7Guns from walls, bullets from nowhere.     I think I know exactly when my life stop making sense.
hash_1739e7ff5019cdd8: ^1Diego: ^7The staff of life! And I do not mean bread.
hash_1739e8ff5019cf8b: ^1Bruno: ^7At last. A chance to heal, not destroy.
hash_173d5f3017e05bb8: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right. It burns you dead bastards, doesn't it?
hash_173d623017e060d1: ^1Bruno: ^7Do not be afraid. Go into the light.
hash_173d643017e06437: ^1Shaw: ^7Scepter...? More like a torch, if you think about it.
hash_1753ae16a0f33ef3: ^1Scarlett: ^7You did good, Uncle Stanton. You did good.
hash_1753b016a0f34259: ^1Diego: ^7Well done, senor Shaw. I am impressed.
hash_1774f2abab1e2910: ^1Bruno: ^7Only a coward hides his face, Destroyer.
hash_1774f3abab1e2ac3: ^1Diego: ^7Looks like it is time for the Mexican Axe Dance again.
hash_1774f5abab1e2e29: ^1Scarlett: ^7I swear I'm gonna catch that axe and shove it up your ass.
hash_1774f8abab1e3342: ^1Shaw: ^7All right, you big bastard, once more, with feeling.
hash_178e5463f7f7d061: ^1Shaw: ^7Thanks, mate. I need all the easy kills I can get to keep up with these heavy hitters. You understand, right?
hash_178e5563f7f7d214: ^1Diego: ^7I could not allow you to continue embarrassing yourself like this.
hash_178e5663f7f7d3c7: ^1Bruno: ^7You tried, monstre. But there is no reward for "trying."
hash_178e5763f7f7d57a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Think about it like this: I could've just let you bleed out.
hash_17a9620ce97e5208: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not sure why we're even here. Bruno could take them all by himself.
hash_17a9640ce97e556e: ^1Diego: ^7Careful Bruno, you keep that up, you may actually crack a smile.    And nothing drives enemies crazier than a big, stupid grin.
hash_17a9670ce97e5a87: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm starting to suspect Bruno is not to be trifled with. Call it a hunch.
hash_180664478dfa258b: ^1Shaw: ^7Curiosity killed the cat? No! A shitload of bullets did.

hash_18393f4b9edae55d: ^1Shaw: ^7Ow! That thing fried my bleedin' eardrums!
hash_1841cfa1a5241392: ^1Diego: ^7HOLD ON - This doesn't feel like a dream. Are we ACTUALLY here?
hash_18636f75319abb10: ^1Diego: ^7Here I am, forces of darkness! Impress me!
hash_18637675319ac6f5: ^1Shaw: ^7Is that ash? Where's the fire??    Oh. There's fires all around us.
hash_193d6fd3dbb8e44e: ^1Diego: ^7That was not my fault. I do not make mistakes.
hash_194af4d88bfa0f79: ^1Shaw: ^7A classical Bathhouse! You've got the mood lighting, the fountains of blood... the full Caligula!    Oh... If these walls could talk...
hash_194af5d88bfa112c: ^1Diego: ^7While I would literally kill for a warm bath, I do not think that this is the place.    So unsanitary.
hash_194af6d88bfa12df: ^1Bruno: ^7In Paris, I go to the bathhouse to wash away the blood.     Perhaps this is where it went.
hash_194af7d88bfa1492: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hope they realize that'll stain the tile... Not great for the pipes either.     Way to ruin a perfectly good water feature.
hash_1961d8f74ef6f118: ^1Bruno: ^7Where are you PRIEST?! You who have unleashed this evil?     You are a soulless coward devoid of reason and empathy. You are Monstre!      I kill Monstres.
hash_1961d9f74ef6f2cb: ^1Diego: ^7As far as I can tell, the jeering crowd appear to have been spared the effects of the.. 'poison'.    As have I.     Curious. Very curious.
hash_1961dbf74ef6f631: ^1Scarlett: ^7Way too much of Dad's nonsense is starting to come true, and that Oracle gal didn't sound too optimistic about our chances...   Boy - Am I gonna give her a surprise when I wrap this shit up and get back to the cave.
hash_1961def74ef6fb4a: ^1Shaw: ^7Aside from the variety of monstrosities trying to eviscerate me, I'm a little distracted by how breezy it is in the old 'undercarriage' area.    Hope nothing pops out by accident.

hash_1966b3ac304f6064: ^1Scarlett: ^7The love of the crowd... Almost makes all this horrific stuff we have to go through worth it.

hash_19dad8dc330f1d11: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, I know I'm the weakest link on this team. No need to rub it in with this crap handgun.

hash_1a16072bbe04ecb1: ^1Diego: ^7Now I am truly the most dangerous man alive.
hash_1a16082bbe04ee64: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, I wanted firepower, and my prayers were answered. With a vengeance.
hash_1a17bc39c940a968: ^1Bruno: ^7Death would be the easy way out. I do not deserve the easy way out.
hash_1a17bf39c940ae81: ^1Scarlett: ^7Time to get back in the fight.
hash_1a17c239c940b39a: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been picking myself up out of the gutter for years. It's what I do.
hash_1a44451c27a41016: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett! Move your tail, sharpish! They're all around you!
hash_1a44471c27a4137c: ^1Bruno: ^7Do not let them outflank you, Scarlett! Fight on your terms, not theirs!
hash_1a44481c27a4152f: ^1Diego: ^7Our favorite lady inventor is about to be overrun.
hash_1a62b977488c163b: ^1Shaw: ^7Ten pounds per weapon? Down from nine-fifty? Now that's a discount to die for!
hash_1a62be77488c1eba: ^1Diego: ^7The box is on sale? Maybe I can pick up a souvenir. Something loud and flashy for the ladies?
hash_1a62bf77488c206d: ^1Bruno: ^7I have never been lucky, but at ten points per try, who needs luck?
hash_1a88de0f2270eb54: ^1Shaw: ^7Way hay! The pachyderm is dead as a door-nail! Victory, good
hash_1ac193661b0a2543: P: 5Ż’į^7I'm not going to last long if they keep swatting me like that.
hash_1ac196661b0a2a5c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Would somebody please watch my rear?     Not you, Diego.
hash_1ac198661b0a2dc2: ^1Diego: ^7I will be needing some antiseptic now. You will be needing a new head.
hash_1ac199661b0a2f75: ^1Bruno: ^7Dammit! I cannot keep track of them all.
hash_1b8757043514725b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, boy. See the one with the blades? Because he sure sees us.
hash_1b8758043514740e: ^1Bruno: ^7Here comes trouble. Big, aggressive, emotional...    The undead version of me.
hash_1b875904351475c1: ^1Diego: ^7Someone new has entered the fight. And he looks like he wants a hug.

hash_1bca2924daba4e02: ^1Bruno: ^7Sometimes the old ways are the best.
hash_1bca2a24daba4fb5: ^1Diego: ^7Brute force has a beauty all its own.
hash_1bdcdf58ebb32901: ^1Shaw: ^7"Stopping power." That's what everyone says about shotguns, right? Because I need all of this to stop.
hash_1bdce058ebb32ab4: ^1Diego: ^7The shotgun. La escopeta. It is deadly in any language.
hash_1bdce158ebb32c67: ^1Bruno: ^7I carried one of these when I was in a Paris gang. They should have called me Buckshot Bruno.
hash_1bdce258ebb32e1a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay, Box, I think I can live with this. Literally.
hash_1be99788f5e52796: ^1Diego: ^7This whole set-up is so elaborate. All we wanted was to open a door. Now we've inhaled hallucinogens, gone back in time, fighting gladiators...     Not complaining. Just...confused.
hash_1be99888f5e52949: ^1Bruno: ^7This is all some kind of game. We are but Pawns to this Priest King. Why? Ah, that is the question.
hash_1be99a88f5e52caf: ^1Shaw: ^7Now where did I put my medicine? I hate not having pockets. Oh, there it is!    Don't ask.

hash_1c0e7ade508e815f: ^1Diego: ^7Look out below!    Oh that is not safe, someone should hang a sign or something.
hash_1c0e7cde508e84c5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keep your eye on the cauldron!     Surprise - it's acid!
hash_1c24b7b88a7e4c80: ^1Bruno: ^7Booo  , boooo... they bleat like the sheep that they are.
hash_1c24b8b88a7e4e33: ^1Diego: ^7The love of the crowd is like a rash - it comes and it goes.
hash_1c24bab88a7e5199: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why don't you try fighting in this outfit, you gold-faced assholes!
hash_1c24bdb88a7e56b2: ^1Shaw: ^7Just so you know - The booing doesn't help!
hash_1c5b0e69259a9b38: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe such actions are random. Something has chosen to taunt me this day.
hash_1c5b0f69259a9ceb: ^1Diego: ^7I hate to see money wasted, especially as I myself was born into poverty.
hash_1c5b1169259aa051: ^1Scarlett: ^7When I catch up to you - I'm not paying again - I'm just gonna kick you open.
hash_1c5b1469259aa56a: ^1Shaw: ^7Sometimes I wish I could transmogrify right out of existence.
hash_1c6c42f01dc32389: ^1Shaw: ^7I see we've graduated to the Viper Bite. Splendid.
hash_1c6c43f01dc3253c: ^1Diego: ^7Ooh, I love when the Viper does this.
hash_1cdfe5eeb5c04a20: ^1Scarlett: ^7Am I glad we remembered to bring those!
hash_1cdfe7eeb5c04d86: ^1Diego: ^7Look at this mess! Where is the Janitor of Ra, or Zeus, or whatever?
hash_1cdfe8eeb5c04f39: ^1Bruno: ^7That should make them think twice. If they think at all.
hash_1cdfeaeeb5c0529f: ^1Shaw: ^7BOOM!    Reminds me of my third lab.
hash_1d1fb4c4bde55370: ^1Shaw: ^7When I signed on for this adventure, I thought it was for my mind, not bloody manual labor.
hash_1d1fb9c4bde55bef: ^1Scarlett: ^7Everything else in the arena looks solid. Yet somehow I'm stuck with these shitty boards.
hash_1d1fbac4bde55da2: ^1Bruno: ^7This wood is as weak as that on the ship.
hash_1d1fbbc4bde55f55: ^1Diego: ^7And so Diego Necalli was sent back in time, expecting to explore history's riches...only to find another pinche construction job!
hash_1d49497c506ef948: ^1Diego: ^7Every time we fight that thing, I just imagine it in high heels, and...it still scares the piss out of me.
hash_1d494a7c506efafb: ^1Bruno: ^7I almost feel pity for that four-legged beast. Right up until it throws up on me...
hash_1d494b7c506efcae: ^1Scarlett: ^7Heads up, fellas! Death on four legs approaching!
hash_1d5b636f70214e4e: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, babosa, you just won't give up, will you?
hash_1d5b646f70215001: ^1Bruno: ^7You should have given up six bullets ago.
hash_1d5b666f70215367: ^1Shaw: ^7Hornet's testicles! I swore I aimed higher than that. This accuracy thing is rather tricky.
hash_1d895b880d12cf2f: ^1Bruno: ^7When I was younger, I would drink anything for a buzz. Have I learned nothing since then?
hash_1d895c880d12d0e2: ^1Scarlett: ^7How do these things work, exactly? Wait -- forget I asked.
hash_1ddccbd3fd744853: ^1Bruno: ^7You want more?! I give you more!
hash_1ddcd1d3fd745285: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, it's so nice to be appreciated!
hash_1e1eb36e826ae413: ^1Shaw: ^7Sometimes you need a moment like this to remember just how much you want to not die.
hash_1e1eb66e826ae92c: ^1Scarlett: ^7No way does this crowd of assholes get to watch me die. Somebody get me back on my feet!
hash_1e1eb86e826aec92: ^1Diego: ^7What is wrong with me today? Is age finally catching up? I did find a gray hair...    A sad end to a man in his late, er, mid-to-early twenties.
hash_1e1eb96e826aee45: ^1Bruno: ^7I have been at death's door before. I do not fear it. Of course, if anyone feels like playing medic...
hash_1e2ae72ffd2bae18: ^1Scarlett: ^7OHH no- big boy incoming! Good thing ancient plate armor wasn't bulletproof, right?  (sharp exhale)  No problem.
hash_1e2e0e1f2879db9f: Maintain maximum crowd affinity for 2 minutes
hash_1e5664c28c0bfd2b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sure, I can be tactical! With graceful maneuvers and whatnot...
hash_1e5665c28c0bfede: ^1Bruno: ^7In the Legion, when the ammo ran low, we learned well-placed shots can defeat an army.
hash_1e5666c28c0c0091: ^1Diego: ^7Ahh, si. I prefer a weapon that requires a little more...artistry.
hash_1e5667c28c0c0244: ^1Shaw: ^7Bollocks to this, I can't be bothered to aim!    "Just shoot them in the head..."    What a fuss!
hash_1eafdb1b0b12fa11: Kill a Blight Father while being grappled by its tongue
hash_1ef400e7e05883b8: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh. Did I throw that too hard?
hash_1f12d2dca8655350: ^1Bruno: ^7Your troubles are ended, gladiator. Wish I could say the same for me.
hash_1f12d3dca8655503: ^1Diego: ^7You should have stuck to chopping wood.
hash_1f12d5dca8655869: ^1Scarlett: ^7So do I get some cheers for this, or what?
hash_1f44eaea889dfe88: ^1Bruno: ^7I think I will let the shotgun do the talking now.
hash_1f44ebea889e003b: ^1Diego: ^7The shotgun, when she kicks and belches fire -- there are few things more satisfying.
hash_1f44edea889e03a1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've noticed that pug-uglies tend to be allergic to buckshot.
hash_1f44f0ea889e08ba: ^1Shaw: ^7Come, my beauty. Whatever screams at us, we'll scream back harder.
hash_1f5f52dd3e7445a4: ^1Bruno: ^7It is normally wise to keep one's head clear in a battle, but today - I am forced to reluctantly agree.
hash_1f75128dfef52fb9: ^1Diego: ^7All this blood, decapitation, dismemberment.    This must be a trip down memory lane for you Bruno!
hash_1fc4199c977eae45: ^1Bruno: ^7Keep coming, you rotten corpses! I have just the thing for you!
hash_1fcfc5e55b95605e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't ask your opinion, Diego. But your face painted is an improvement. You should put more on. If you can't find any more paint - Use some manure.
hash_1fd0d5eecad5cf51: ^1Shaw: ^7When you're finished there, Bruno, mind lending an old man a hand?
hash_1fd0d6eecad5d104: ^1Diego: ^7A friendly wager, Bruno! Whoever kills five hundred first buys the other a nice merlot.
hash_1fd0d8eecad5d46a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Bruno's racking up a hell of a bodycount...!
hash_1fd2e6fc381a2e21: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, I was never one to pass up a free lunch...
hash_1fd2e7fc381a2fd4: ^1Diego: ^7I will take it, but do not think for a minute that I can be bought.
hash_1fd2e8fc381a3187: ^1Bruno: ^7Points for guns. Points for bullets. Everything in this place is murder-fuel.
hash_1fd2e9fc381a333a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Thanks, Elder Gods. Still gonna murder your high priest, though.
hash_1fd92a6b67c15262: ^1Diego: ^7Whatever "medicine" you're on, Shaw -- keep taking it!
hash_1fd92b6b67c15415: ^1Bruno: ^7Keep aiming for the brain, Shaw! Just like that!
hash_1fe81e41d4c13f3b: ^1Scarlett: ^7They can't stand the light of day.
hash_1fe81f41d4c140ee: ^1Bruno: ^7Let it take you, diables. There is nothing to fear.
hash_1fe82041d4c142a1: ^1Diego: ^7Like staring into the sun, yes?     You know, if you're a vampire.
hash_1fe82141d4c14454: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm cooking them Ra! Ha! Get it? Ra...?
hash_201dc4f7014282d8: ^1Shaw: ^7It's a bit on the heavy side.    But I'll soldier on as best I can.
hash_201dc9f701428b57: ^1Scarlett: ^7Is it wrong that I was hoping to get the angry little monster?
hash_201dcaf701428d0a: ^1Bruno: ^7This should be enough firepower... for now.
hash_201dcbf701428ebd: ^1Diego: ^7I would not wish to face an enemy wielding such a rifle.
hash_20295d8f7dc8f05a: ^1Diego: ^7I think you are right my french friend. It will be very interesting to see how he chooses to reward us.
hash_20399f009d6132c9: ^1Shaw: ^7The weapon outlines, yes! Of course! Not just an outline, but a window to another realm...?
hash_2039a0009d61347c: ^1Diego: ^7Guns from walls. This will never feel normal.
hash_2039a1009d61362f: ^1Bruno: ^7If these walls could speak...would they offer me a receipt?
hash_2039a2009d6137e2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't stare at it too long, Scarlett. You can get lost in there.
hash_20b8b8a552d602b8: ^1Bruno: ^7None of you are a match for me. But all of you? That is another story...
hash_20b8b9a552d6046b: ^1Diego: ^7I have seen this look before -- in the children's eyes at my nephew's birthday.     And me? I am the pinata.
hash_20b8bba552d607d1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've got something for you freaks, but you're not gonna like it.
hash_20b8bea552d60cea: ^1Shaw: ^7Back off, maggot-brains, you're cramping my style.
hash_20d9b45a2174250e: ^1Bruno: ^7Get clear of them, Scarlett. Your father would never forgive me if I let you die.
hash_20d9b55a217426c1: ^1Diego: ^7Are you trying to get overwhelmed, Scarlett? Because you are about to succeed.
hash_20d9b65a21742874: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody double vision. Looks like Scarlett's fighting a whole mob of--    Oh, dear. Get out of there, girl!
hash_211058c82cde56e0: ^1Bruno: ^7So here I am, lost in antiquity, killing dead men with a bug.     Such is my life...
hash_21161c3b7c7ee5f0: ^1Shaw: ^7If you'd told me ten years ago I'd be slaying monsters today, I probably would've said..."Yeah. That checks out."
hash_2116213b7c7eee6f: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's not you, it's meat. Dead meat.
hash_2116223b7c7ef022: ^1Bruno: ^7What sins must one commit to end up like you? Is this the fate that awaits me?
hash_2116233b7c7ef1d5: ^1Diego: ^7Do not be ashamed, amigo. Sooner or later, everyone falls for Diego.
hash_2127982784f59759: ^1Shaw: ^7And that is what they mean by "thunderstruck"!
hash_2127992784f5990c: ^1Diego: ^7This is a good look for me, no?
hash_21279b2784f59c72: ^1Scarlett: ^7Who wants to be in my science experiment?!
hash_213c69249389f28b: ^1Shaw: ^7First you, then whoever stole my clothes and painted me like some Celtic streetwalker!
hash_213c6c249389f7a4: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you left a scar on me, I swear to all four of these gods...
hash_2141d5a678494ace: ^1Shaw: ^7Is that hammering I hear? Or did my poor heart finally explode?
hash_2141d7a678494e34: ^1Bruno: ^7I have grown to love the sound of hammers.
hash_2141d8a678494fe7: ^1Diego: ^7Heh. My father was a carpenter.    Wait. Papi...?! Are you here?!
hash_2141daa67849534d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Bought us a few seconds. Let's put them to use!
hash_21c121157aba77f0: ^1Bruno: ^7Shhh now. It is not so bad, bleeding to death.
hash_21c122157aba79a3: ^1Diego: ^7HA! And now we bleed! You see? It is easy.
hash_21c124157aba7d09: ^1Scarlett: ^7To think this is how people used to kill each other!
hash_21c127157aba8222: ^1Shaw: ^7They are so much worse up close!
hash_21ef045dcd073d59: ^1Shaw: ^7Where'd that arm go? Maybe I could borrow it -- give the maggot-brains a taste of their own medicine!
hash_21ef055dcd073f0c: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes, keep coming. Let me finish the job.
hash_21ef065dcd0740bf: ^1Bruno: ^7Enjoy this moment, monstre. The next shot is your head.
hash_21ef075dcd074272: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well, I shot off part of you. That's gotta count for something.
hash_21f26e87b0397974: ^1Shaw: ^7I know things are bit grim and all, but I do think it's important to look on the bright side.     It's a lovely sunny day. I think I'm getting a tan.
hash_21fac143b697212e: ^1Shaw: ^7What was that?? Did those slimy bastards shatter my lovely shield??
hash_21fac343b6972494: ^1Bruno: ^7Even le Taureau could not hold off their onslaught forever. I shall need a fresh shield.
hash_21fac443b6972647: ^1Diego: ^7Whoever created this shield couldd not anticipate the beating it would take.
hash_21fac643b69729ad: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe the workmanship wasn't as good as I hoped.
hash_221333aa4fdd1936: ^1Shaw: ^7Gracious me, I've never been a legend before! Feels... queasy.
hash_221335aa4fdd1c9c: ^1Bruno: ^7You like destruction?! You have not glimpsed the ruin I bring!
hash_221336aa4fdd1e4f: ^1Diego: ^7Perfecto - they adore me! I will celebrate by continuing to not die!
hash_2215286405571096: ^1Shaw: ^7It's like a bloody casino, this place. Which makes me nervous, because the house always wins.
hash_22152a64055713fc: ^1Bruno: ^7This makes me uneasy. One does not get something for nothing.
hash_22152b64055715af: ^1Diego: ^7Even the forces of darkness smile upon Diego. Hey, what can I say?

hash_2256c139346f52e9: ^1Shaw: ^7Slice them all to nuggets!    NOW who is bite sized?!
hash_2256c239346f549c: ^1Diego: ^7Decapitations always play well with the crowd! And the crowd...    Loves Diego.
hash_2256c339346f564f: ^1Bruno: ^7A violent end for violent creatures.    I will see you in hell.
hash_2256c439346f5802: ^1Scarlett: ^7Huh. Turns kinda slow doesn't she? Give her a bigger driver gear, maybe offset the teeth - she could shred ten heads a second.
hash_226dcffe83b56639: ^1Diego: ^7You got first blood, I got last!
hash_226dd0fe83b567ec: ^1Shaw: ^7Ha! Got you! And I should feel better, but I don't so--
hash_227dff5b499f19f8: ^1Shaw: ^7This ought to stitch up your wounds. Let me know if you need anything...recreational.
hash_227e045b499f2277: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't get too excited. I might need you for cannon fodder.
hash_227e055b499f242a: ^1Bruno: ^7That wound on your face will leave a nasty scar.    Ha! Just kidding, pretty-boy.
hash_22e3ca4ca798a61e: ^1Shaw: ^7You know, I'm surprised these work so well. Usually my success rate is 40-60.    20-80, if I'm being honest.
hash_22e3cc4ca798a984: ^1Bruno: ^7This one has an oily texture, oui? Not olive oil oily. Engine oil oily.
hash_22e3cd4ca798ab37: ^1Diego: ^7Ay! That one's burning all the way down to my estomago.     *Big Burp* Bueno. Back to the killing...
hash_22e3cf4ca798ae9d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay, that didn't taste like anything. Didn't even feel wet.
hash_22e7e36c1f2df0e7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Lemme guess: it's my perfume, right?     Oh, yeah, I don't wear perfume.
hash_22f7efd43258fd40: ^1Bruno: ^7Symbols in the fire! Can anyone see?    I saw them... didn't I?
hash_22f7f0d43258fef3: ^1Diego: ^7A trap of flames! I like this, it adds an element of danger
hash_22f7f5d432590772: ^1Shaw: ^7You call that a fire? Clearly you haven't seen my lab... Have you?    I think I burned it down.
hash_23368ac49feed2a1: ^1Bruno: ^7Yes, little chakrams, I know you are there.
hash_23865a6a7c93ed80: ^1Diego: ^7Get out of there, Scarlett! Do not show off just to impress me.
hash_23865b6a7c93ef33: ^1Bruno: ^7Get away from them, mademoiselle! You are no good to us dead!
hash_2386616a7c93f965: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett, luv, you won't last long standing there.

hash_23dc19a3e23b22cb: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't help but feel a bit self-conscious watching Diego fight!    Let's face it: he's kind of  majestic.
hash_23dc1ca3e23b27e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7There goes Diego, gunning down freaks with that big, stupid grin on his face.
hash_23dc1fa3e23b2cfd: ^1Bruno: ^7It seems the only thing bigger than Diego's bodycount is his insufferable ego.

hash_2885a54817b04279: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes! Board up those windows! While you're at it, build me a carriage so I can get the hell out of here!
hash_2885a64817b0442c: ^1Diego: ^7Those barriers are as flimsy as El Presidente's promises.

hash_28e9f346e8a72c86: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody hell, Bruno! You trying to break some sort of record?
hash_28e9f646e8a7319f: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno claims he hates violence --  but there is a thin line between love and hate, no?
hash_28e9f846e8a73505: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn! I'm tempted to just hang back and let Bruno finish these guys off.
hash_28eb985aca774919: ^1Shaw: ^7This Norseman must have been a great warrior in life. That or he was incredibly rich.    Or maybe he just really liked boats...
hash_28eb995aca774acc: ^1Diego: ^7Now that is a sensational funeral idea! Set ablaze with sword in hand and pushed out to join the sea...    I really should write this down.
hash_28eb9a5aca774c7f: ^1Bruno: ^7Burn in life, burn in death - this is the way for such men. Maybe in ashes, we finally rest.
hash_28eb9b5aca774e32: ^1Scarlett: ^7A funeral barge for a true warrior. All that's missing is a drunk adolescent girl to throw herself onto the pyre with him.     Lovely tradition.
hash_293a4a85363eae70: ^1Diego: ^7When I was a boy, I wanted to be a lion tamer. I take it all back now.
hash_293a4b85363eb023: ^1Bruno: ^7Here, kitties. I will put you out of your misery.
hash_293a4c85363eb1d6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why do I hate shooting these tigers? It's not like they're cute, or fluffy, or even smell nice...
hash_294877f7feb642f3: ^1Shaw: ^7"Hey! There goes Shotgun Shaw." Said no one ever. Until today...
hash_29487af7feb6480c: ^1Scarlett: ^7I tend to win every argument with one of these in hand.
hash_29487cf7feb64b72: ^1Diego: ^7Not the most subtle instrument of war, but then again, neither am I.
hash_29487df7feb64d25: ^1Bruno: ^7There is only one thing that punches harder than me.     Meet le fusil. She is our new best friend.
hash_29693fe88ac96d78: ^1Scarlett: ^7HELLO? Anyone else around? Or did you all just sober up way too fast - snap right back to the cave?      Looks like it's all on me. Again.
hash_296941e88ac970de: ^1Diego: ^7Well... I started to get worried pretty much the very second the lady said 'Pray for your safe return!'    I thought she was being 'theatrical', but now I understand her extra-ominous tone.
hash_296942e88ac97291: ^1Bruno: ^7This is not a battle we prepared for, but I am starting to recognize how it is part of a much larger war...     One my conscience tells me I may be destined to fight.
hash_296944e88ac975f7: ^1Shaw: ^7Wait a minute... Where's everyone else? Did they chicken out at the last second?? I bloody knew it!    I thought I saw Bruno looking at me funny!
hash_2973e3b9ff692bf1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let go of me, you putrid bag of feces!

hash_2ac155981743d633: ^1Scarlett: ^7Diego, keep moving! Don't let them overwhelm you!

hash_2bf18201f54178a3: Arena to Ra Tower Gate Opened!
hash_2c1aa40fdf1a1453: ^1Scarlett: ^7That little troll has delusions of grandeur. Who does he think he is?
hash_2cacad5d4a6388d8: Ä†”«#`Ĺ]NŁ~ņūõ£ĽZčŇŇ`…{ŗ5ŔBŗ£Iį√≤ÝŚxBņ8 and eating people, they're flame retardant too!     I guess I'll work around it.
hash_2cacaf5d4a638c3e: ^1Diego: ^7They are immune to the flames?! Que mierda, this is not fair!
hash_2cacb05d4a638df1: ^1Bruno: ^7The devils move through the fire unscathed...    Eh! Blades and bullets work well enough.
hash_2cacb25d4a639157: ^1Shaw: ^7What?? The fire doesn't harm them?? That's poppycock!     Or should I say - Codswallop?!
hash_2cc43fc23106eee8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shake it off, my friend. Don't give this crowd of assholes the satisfaction.
hash_2cc441c23106f24e: ^1Diego: ^7Someone once told me the French die too easily. Let's go prove him wrong.
hash_2cc444c23106f767: ^1Shaw: ^7I can mend your wounds, but you better help me get your giant arse up off the floor.
hash_2cd203f50544860e: ^1Shaw: ^7Hm. Nothing. I must be building up a tolerance to--WHOAAA!!!
hash_2cd205f505448974: ^1Bruno: ^7Agh. Dizzy...numb...head spinning...    Can I try that one again?
hash_2cd206f505448b27: ^1Diego: ^7I never wondered what existential despair smells like...but now I know.
hash_2cd208f505448e8d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Years of clean living, and now I'm huffing vapors left and right.
hash_2cd2c5d06d7292c0: ^1Shaw: ^7Today's special in the Bloody Arena Food Court - "Slappy Daniels' Soup!"     It is not very good. Bit too 'burny' for my tastes.
hash_2cd2cad06d729b3f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Clear the deck, dumping acid! Look out - here it comes...!     Nobody listens to me.
hash_2cd2cbd06d729cf2: ^1Bruno: ^7Some stains do not wash away.    Some do.
hash_2cd2ccd06d729ea5: ^1Diego: ^7Get ready for a slight burning sensation, chupa carnes!
hash_2cfe4d1ff6228331: ^1Shaw: ^7Looks like you zigged when you should have zagged. I do the same thing all the time.
hash_2cfe4e1ff62284e4: ^1Diego: ^7You do not look happy to see me. Should I just leave you there?
hash_2cfe501ff622884a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You okay, Bruno? I didn't bring you all this way just to get you killed.
hash_2d0da6f1b29b7810: ^1Bruno: ^7Get to the skull box before the sale ends! We need firepower!
hash_2d0da7f1b29b79c3: ^1Diego: ^7I am not what they call a "cheapskate." I believe you get what you pay for.    Still...ten pesos for a weapon...
hash_2d0da9f1b29b7d29: ^1Scarlett: ^7Something tells me that bone box has bigger and better weapons if we just keep feeding it points.
hash_2d0dacf1b29b8242: ^1Shaw: ^7That box really needs to work on its sales pitch.
hash_2d349b9988703e43: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh no, what a shame, I've lost the crowd.
hash_2d349c9988703ff6: ^1Bruno: ^7Throw your insults and your shit! This is who you are!
hash_2d349d99887041a9: ^1Diego: ^7Please, my adoring fans, please! Calm yourselves!
hash_2d349e998870435c: ^1Shaw: ^7Bollocks to you too, you gold-plated piss-heads!
hash_2d72f221928664d8: ^1Diego: ^7I know that I am under the influence of powerful exotic drugs, but this event feels too real... A little too... spectacular!    It feels like my birthday!
hash_2d72f3219286668b: ^1Bruno: ^7That artifact the Priest had... I have seen its like before.    I will fold it in half and feed it to him! May he shit it out sideways.
hash_2d72f4219286683e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay you Golden Sadistic son of a bitch...     Not only am I going to jump through ALL the hoops, I'm going to entertain your damn followers while I do it.
hash_2d72f921928670bd: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, my adoring fans! Stanton Shaw has returned! I know, I'm not really here and you're not really cheering for me...    But damn it - this is my hallucination!
hash_2da9edd5fe169852: ^1Diego: ^7Ladies and gentlemen, damas y caballeros, we are going to Pound-Town.
hash_2dad57abb20e0348: ^1Bruno: ^7This was a game.    Now it is a war.
hash_2dad58abb20e04fb: ^1Diego: ^7Si, si, si....before anyone jokes - I am NOT compensating for ANYTHING.
hash_2dad5aabb20e0861: ^1Scarlett: ^7And here I thought I wasn't going to enjoy myself today...
hash_2dad5dabb20e0d7a: ^1Shaw: ^7Look at that: a surplus population! Let's blast the Dickensian daylights out of it!
hash_2dc0e10e1e20b9ee: ^1Diego: ^7Hijo de su madre, you scratch like a rabid chihuahua!
hash_2dd03d1fdee9e820: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh good, it didn't explode!    Never trust necrotic gasses...
hash_2dd0421fdee9f09f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ahh, yep! Now there's blood in my eye.     I'm gonna kill you all for that...
hash_2dd0431fdee9f252: ^1Bruno: ^7Many have called me "butcher." I think because of my facial hair.
hash_2dd0441fdee9f405: ^1Diego: ^7Come on, cabron! You can take a few more!
hash_2de26a167032bdbb: ^1Shaw: ^7They love me! This is the happiest worst day of my life!
hash_2de26d167032c2d4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wow, they are really losing their minds up there!
hash_2de26f167032c63a: ^1Diego: ^7Si, the crowd loves me... I don't let it go to my head.
hash_2de3be4032d26246: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are you so bloody obsessed with my eye, Bruno? You must have seen far worse in your soldiering days...     And your gangster days.
hash_2e3379fc204ab373: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett was wrong about you, Shaw.    Er...forget I said that.
hash_2e337bfc204ab6d9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey, what do you know? You actually got that right.
hash_2e775971a80e4481: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sooner we get done here, the sooner we get back. What waits for us beyond the door?
hash_2e7938d7b3525158: ^1Bruno: ^7I cannot take all the credit...but I will take the minimum amount.
hash_2e793bd7b3525671: ^1Scarlett: ^7We got lots to do before we crack the champagne.
hash_2e9e5b687ffd2e47: Odin Basement to Tunnel Gate Opened!
hash_2ea285deef4bfc3d: ^1Scarlett: ^7The crowd wants entertainment?  (talking to crowd)  Well, here you go!
hash_2ee1271d8dfde87e: ^1Diego: ^7I did, but I don't think he was paying all that much attention. You know how 'distracted' he can get.     Now - What was that about his amazing 'linguistics'?
hash_2eee7e84237e2a48: ^1Diego: ^7Few things are as beautiful as a perfect shot.

hash_3bfd7ee1352d3979: ^1Diego: ^7You are getting surrounded, Shaw. Stupid death for a man so smart.
hash_3c31983964ddbbae: ^1Diego: ^7Where I'm from, that would be 'mas ammo'...
hash_3c31993964ddbd61: ^1Bruno: ^7I shall put these bullets to better  use than I have done in the past.
hash_3c319b3964ddc0c7: ^1Shaw: ^7Sulfur, charcoal, potassium nitrate. I can make gunpowder if you're hiring!...     In the... uh... 'max ammo' factory...

hash_3d0af09c10d73750: |1Shaw: ^7Step up, worm-brains! Let's have a thumping good time.
hash_3d0af59c10d73fcf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not the most ladylike weapon. But, then, I'm no lady...
hash_3d0af69c10d74182: ^1Bruno: ^7Face it, Bruno, this is what you are best at.
hash_3d0af79c10d74335: ^1Diego: ^7Unwieldy weapon? Perhaps. Last thing you will ever see? Oh, yes...
hash_3d1aecc1b28bb91e: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are they closing in on me? Is it pheromones? Or do they just like their meat half-burnt?
hash_3d1aeec1b28bbc84: ^1Bruno: ^7It is getting crowded here. I need more room to operate.
hash_3d1aefc1b28bbe37: ^1Diego: ^7If anyone wants to give me a hand here, I would not object.
hash_3d1af1c1b28bc19d: ^1Scarlett: ^7You guys are the neediest flesh-eaters ever. Come on, it's embarrassing!
hash_3d1de55cb996cc00: ^1Bruno: ^7Diego, you stand in what we legionnaires call the "kill box."      Do not remain in the kill box.     Idiot.
hash_3d1de85cb996d119: ^1Scarlett: ^7Dammit, Diego, keep moving! Don't let them overwhelm you!
hash_3d1deb5cb996d632: ^1Shaw: ^7There's no shame in running, Diego! And I am the authority on "no shame."
hash_3d2e6bafcbc1b7b6: ^1Shaw: ^7OOF, fuck me! Bit weighty, this...    All right, all right, I've got it. There's elastic left in the old groin yet--    THERE, IT'S GONE!
hash_3d2e6dafcbc1bb1c: ^1Bruno: ^7What few women I have known in my life, each of them has told me to...express myself.    Today, I will try.
hash_3d2e6eafcbc1bccf: ^1Diego: ^7At last, I have a calling card to introduce myself...properly.
hash_3d40ab82af4def58: ^1Shaw: ^7For a bunch of zealots, they're a wonderful crowd!
hash_3d40b082af4df7d7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Should all this applause feel this good?
hash_3d40b182af4df98a: ^1Bruno: ^7You like this so much?! Climb down from your seats, and join me,   eh?!
hash_3d9bd908095e8af4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Brace yourselves. Mister In-Your-Face is back with his pig-stickers.
hash_3d9bdb08095e8e5a: ^1Diego: ^7I wonder, do they all start as little chupacarnes and then get promoted?     Was this armored cabron just a screamer last week?
hash_3d9bdc08095e900d: ^1Bruno: ^7Over here, marauder! You want to leap at someone? Come to Bruno!
hash_3db0ca230492a1c0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shut your golden face-holes, I'm not doing this for you!
hash_3db0cc230492a526: ^1Diego: ^7Tranquilo everyone! Now begins my glorious comeback!
hash_3db0cd230492a6d9: ^1Bruno: ^7So this is the bottom... I have been here before.
hash_3db0cf230492aa3f: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh yes, boooooo! Boo the old man fighting for his bloody life!
hash_3dd99b068f468716: ^1Diego: ^7Yes! I can feel the power coursing through these things.
hash_3dd99e068f468c2f: ^1Shaw: ^7One very close shave, coming right up.
hash_3e03743067902b8b: ^1Scarlett: ^7We might have this in the bag after all. If nothing else goes wrong.
hash_3e2be45acfa798cd: You already have a Challenge Banner
hash_3e57a14e40becaf0: ^1Diego: ^7How does one get in on this scam? I could use the extra pesos...
hash_3e57a34e40bece56: ^1Scarlett: ^7No way around it: I'm gonna have to earn my survival today.
hash_3e57a84e40bed6d5: ^1Shaw: ^7In all seriousness...what need does this thing need money for??

hash_3ebef65d918ffbb5: ^1Bruno: ^7Bravo! Perhaps things will work out after all.
hash_3ef2519ebff9a0e0: ^1Diego: ^7No task is beneath Diego. Look! I graciously rebuilt this barrier!    Can I please stop now?
hash_3ef2529ebff9a293: ^1Bruno: ^7Repair the barricades! They will soon be upon us!
hash_3ef2589ebff9acc5: ^1Shaw: ^7Just wake me up when it's all over.
hash_3eff64100e86d96e: ^1Shaw: ^7If the Great Beyond won't help me, then fine. I'll get more ammo myself.
hash_3eff66100e86dcd4: ^1Bruno: ^7I did not wish to purchase more munitions. But I was left with no choice.
hash_3eff67100e86de87: ^1Diego: ^7It is embarrassing that I must resort to purchasing ammo... normally fantasma is more helpful.
hash_3eff69100e86e1ed: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least the walls still have our backs...and our bullets.
hash_3eff86808e2a3ee9: ^1Scarlett: ^7That fucking letter. He told me things. Things I didn't know. Things I need to learn more about.     And the only way to do that is to get him back from that fucking cult.
hash_3f1eb95801eb5ec5: ^1Shaw: ^7That's quite enough out of you! And you! And you! The whole lot of you!
hash_3f2a310d4465a0cc: ^1Shaw: ^7Is no one else going to comment on how ridiculous we look? I mean - honestly - I feel like some kind of Celtic barbarian.
hash_3f3c2c603df36570: ^1Diego: ^7Well, at least I don't have to look at your face anymore.
hash_3f3c33603df37155: ^1Shaw: ^7That was an act of kindness, worm-brain. As in kindly leave me alone!

hash_3f876c3f99987e68: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm surprised Shaw can hold that gun steady, let alone nail a head-shot.
hash_3f876e3f999881ce: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw! Have you been studying my technique? You seem to be improving.
hash_3f876f3f99988381: ^1Bruno: ^7It seems the Chemist is perfecting the science of the head-shot.
hash_3fc351e41723ef48: ^1Scarlett: ^7You just messed with the wrong gladiatrix!
hash_3fc354e41723f461: ^1Bruno: ^7I have had it. You all die now!
hash_3fc356e41723f7c7: ^1Shaw: ^7Gladiator ghouls fight better than the ones on Titanic. Or is it that I got worse...?
hash_40120a7c7f90fb60: ^1Diego: ^7Let us play a game for the crowd! I will be the matador, and you will be the bull! OLE!
hash_40120c7c7f90fec6: ^1Scarlett: ^7OHH shit- big boy incoming! Good thing ancient plate armor wasn't bulletproof, right?     No problem.
hash_4012117c7f910745: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh my, not this dream again! Large man... pointy horns... bull iconography!!    No Sir! You can't have my shoes - they were a gift from my Nan!
hash_4050d86f7b851080: ^1Shaw: ^7A winning streak for Shaw! I'm as giddy as I was on my wedding day!    And we all know how that turned out.
hash_4050dd6f7b8518ff: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can do this all day, freaks! Can you say the same??     Okay, yeah, you probably can.
hash_4050de6f7b851ab2: ^1Bruno: ^7You can keep coming, but you will not make me enjoy this.
hash_4050df6f7b851c65: ^1Diego: ^7Come on, pendejos! The crowd demands blood, and I aim to please!
hash_409a1ece384a3fb6: ^1Bruno: ^7One less monster. All of Hell to go.
hash_409a20ce384a431c: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm nailing some incredible headshots. Hope I'm not sobering up...
hash_41003145b52f9050: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I probably see the world more clearly than you, Diego. Especially this one.    'In the kingdom of the blind, the one eyed man is King.'
hash_411bb12937269b1b: ^1Shaw: ^7This is how the sausage is made.
hash_411bb6293726a39a: ^1Diego: ^7Ordinarily, I like to be the center of attention. Not this time.
hash_411bb7293726a54d: ^1Bruno: ^7It is like a magnet. A magnet made of razors.
hash_413b7a089d44a362: ^1Shaw: ^7Where is that box? I've got ten quid burning a hole in my pocket.
hash_41418fc51f2702c7: ^1Diego: ^7Assuming we find the information that the Oracle spoke of - what do you expect lies beyond the doorway...?
hash_416db2a2474f69e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Resolve?? Right.      Let me tell you something Bruno - I'm the only reason he didn't squander the entirety of the family fortune on his stupid adventures.
hash_41e727fb8b4ffdc8: ^1Diego: ^7Lucky me! I adore these little spitfires!
hash_41e728fb8b4fff7b: ^1Bruno: ^7So much death packed into such a neat little package.
hash_41e729fb8b50012e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I like these smaller guns. It's like they built them just for me. S.M.G.: Scarlett's Machine Gun.
hash_41e72efb8b5009ad: ^1Shaw: ^7Now, this is a gun built for me. Light, quick, and given to lengthy outbursts that'll knock you dead.
hash_41f0973706703f7e: ^1Shaw: ^7A lad could make a fortune selling these to warlords around the globe. Could also start a world war...
hash_41f09937067042e4: ^1Bruno: ^7I keep wondering if these weapons come from the future. And I worry about any future that has such weapons in it.
hash_41f09a3706704497: ^1Diego: ^7I am used to getting what I want, but this really is "just what I needed."
hash_41f09c37067047fd: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is something I can work with.
hash_41f291f6ca093009: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm going to pack, and re-pack, and re-re-pack this peashooter.      And then I'm gonna shoot this stupid box.
hash_41f4b6a155df9499: ^1Shaw: ^7Dash it all, why must Diego make it look so easy?
hash_4212ed5ec3ea02b8: ^1Shaw: ^7Hey! Nobody throws up on me but me!
hash_4212f25ec3ea0b37: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let go of me, you putrid bag of shit!
hash_4212f35ec3ea0cea: ^1Bruno: ^7Let me go, demon! Haven't I suffered enough?!
hash_4212f45ec3ea0e9d: ^1Diego: ^7I'll try anything once, but this? Even Diego Necalli has his limits!
hash_42147f2ac7091fbe: ^1Shaw: ^7Sorry, mate, not today. Do feel free to try again.
hash_4214812ac7092324: ^1Bruno: ^7You certainly were in a hurry to die.
hash_4214822ac70924d7: ^1Diego: ^7I, too, would seek a quick death if I had a face like yours.
hash_4214842ac709283d: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's what mindless rage gets ya. A mindless death.
hash_42430fff246a7e76: ^1Bruno: ^7Am I on fire? Because it feels like I'm on fire.
hash_424310ff246a8029: ^1Diego: ^7I think I smell my hair burning! Say it is not so!
hash_424311ff246a81dc: ^1Shaw: ^7Fwoosh! Like mixing sodium chlorate, acid and sugar.     'Cept there's nothing sweet about those fire-ghouls.
hash_427463d4d162c2a8: ^1Diego: ^7Once more, I am forced to do business with the money-hungry walls.
hash_427464d4d162c45b: ^1Bruno: ^7The walls here -- they are like the ones on the ship.
hash_427465d4d162c60e: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least the walls are helping us out. That's something, I guess.
hash_42746ad4d162ce8d: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm pretty sure Alistair never mentioned walls selling guns. Mostly sure. Sixty-eight percent sure, at least.
hash_42a2ccb96677047a: ^1Diego: ^7Don't look so surprised, of course everything is fine.
hash_42a2cdb96677062d: ^1Bruno: ^7Good, good...but the fight is not yet over.
hash_42d0f617999d6220: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, come on. I've been on fire myself - wasn't that bad.
hash_42d0fb17999d6a9f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Great. That smell. I'll never eat bacon again.
hash_42d0fc17999d6c52: ^1Bruno: ^7At least they did not die by *my* hand...
hash_42d0fd17999d6e05: ^1Diego: ^7I myself have drifted far to close to the flame - on more than one occasions.

hash_43189550b80edf18: ^1Shaw: ^7Let's light a fire in their bellies, shall we?
hash_43189a50b80ee797: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's got nothing on mine, but... the shield's pretty well made.
hash_43189b50b80ee94a: ^1Bruno: ^7This design is magnifique. Whoever made this was a true master.
hash_43189c50b80eeafd: ^1Diego: ^7A shield and a katar?     Of course I know what a katar is. Clearly you have not heard about my mission to India.
hash_431bdc68bac77877: ^1Bruno: ^7I cannot keep track of them all!
hash_4347db4183eda380: ^1Shaw: ^7Crikey, what a specimen! What does it eat in the wild? Elephants??
hash_4347e04183edabff: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right! I just killed a bunch of corpses with a magic scorpion.     This is why I became an engineer.
hash_4347e24183edaf65: ^1Diego: ^7Hijo de puta! If this disgusting creature can do that, I will suppress the need to vomit!
hash_434b386371dee2cc: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are you still trying? You've got no arm!
hash_435793abb05f6dd3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hopefully I can line up a good shot on the High Priest, because otherwise this thing is useless.
hash_43655ec1620de0f1: ^1Shaw: ^7New weapon available! Fresh off the press! Never been fired!
hash_43655fc1620de2a4: ^1Diego: ^7I think I'll stick to my guns. The ones I'm already carrying.
hash_436560c1620de457: ^1Bruno: ^7Would my companions care for a new weapon?
hash_436561c1620de60a: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't think that's for me. Who wants it?
hash_447c26912dd35173: ^1Shaw: ^7Not sure why I grabbed this. Just seemed like the thing to do.
hash_447c29912dd3568c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not sure what this is for, but I'll figure it out.
hash_447c2b912dd359f2: ^1Diego: ^7Who knows what this is? I don't. Yet.
hash_44a30a23fe6423e1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know what this one does, but did it have to smell like a dog's rear?
hash_44b50312037481b0: ^1Diego: ^7Sometimes I don't know why I even bother.
hash_44b5041203748363: ^1Bruno: ^7I will work with what I must, but this? This just seems like a cruel joke.
hash_44b50a1203748d95: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm expected to kill an army of the dead with this?
hash_45058c480c7f48f0: ^1Bruno: ^7Mademoiselle Rhodes may not be professionally trained, but what training she had serves well.
hash_45058d480c7f4aa3: ^1Diego: ^7Impressive, senorita! You are almost as good as me.
hash_450592480c7f5322: ^1Shaw: ^7I've seen that kind of withering fury before. No, not from Alistair...    From my ex.
hash_451a92a59c6e0bfa: ^1Diego: ^7This one seemed furious at me. I wonder...did I do something in a past life?
hash_451a93a59c6e0dad: ^1Bruno: ^7You will never hurt anyone else. I wish I could say the same for myself.
hash_4529e51c4475ee37: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on you poor legless runt, just die! You're simply depressing!
