hash_45d9d9f208b30400: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are the Gods asking for money? Don't they already have more money than...well, you know.
hash_45d9def208b30c7f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I feel like a starving kid with her nosed pressed to the restaurant window.
hash_45d9dff208b30e32: ^1Bruno: ^7We are not finished here. I will return when I can meet your demands.
hash_45d9e0f208b30fe5: ^1Diego: ^7Everything here wants to kill me. Everything else wants money to help me not be killed.    Ladies and gentlemen: capitalism.
hash_45dcb859ab272da6: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, I don't like the sound of that. Not one ruddy bit.
hash_45dcba59ab27310c: ^1Bruno: ^7Form up, my friends. The enemy approaches.
hash_45dcbb59ab2732bf: ^1Diego: ^7Time to give the crowd a reason to cheer. "Diego!" "Diego!"
hash_45dcbd59ab273625: ^1Scarlett: ^7Alright, coliseum. Let's see what you got!
hash_45edcec1280f1188: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't mind me, I'm just clearing out the riffraff.
hash_45edd0c1280f14ee: ^1Diego: ^7They better be working hard at the monster factory, because I am running out of targets.
hash_45edd1c1280f16a1: ^1Bruno: ^7You all follow your leader so mindlessly. And you all pay the price.
hash_45edd3c1280f1a07: ^1Shaw: ^7What say you, audience? Yay or nay for the crusty ol' Brit?
hash_45f408d6567728b8: ^1Bruno: ^7Somehow...I do not know how...this is Diego's fault.
hash_45fcaa6363555f20: ^1Bruno: ^7If things go poorly, my Scepter's at the ready.
hash_45fcb06363556952: ^1Shaw: ^7My Scepter's charged. Call out if you get hurt.
hash_4656da08351e012f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Got a cannon and whip-sword at the ready.
hash_4656dc08351e0495: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, Dragon, I'll awaken you and Viper soon enough.
hash_46c91c36aaf59c61: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that's lovely. Like a bloody thunderclap.
hash_46c91d36aaf59e14: ^1Diego: ^7Is it magic? Or is it just me?
hash_46c91e36aaf59fc7: ^1Bruno: ^7Is this my lot in life? To bludgeon and smash? SO BE IT!
hash_46c91f36aaf5a17a: ^1Scarlett: ^7What? You never seen a gal with a magic hammer?
hash_46dbec572d6bf316: ^1Diego: ^7Okay - I shall win their hearts again soon enough.
hash_46dbef572d6bf82f: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh come off it! I'm doing fine!
hash_472dcf6962c678e3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Same deal as the walls on the Titanic. Maybe Shaw's right about it all being connected.
hash_472dd06962c67a96: ^1Bruno: ^7As a soldier, I never questioned where my gun came from. I should not start now.
hash_472dd16962c67c49: ^1Diego: ^7They did not have such weapons during this era. Not that I am complaining.
hash_472dd26962c67dfc: ^1Shaw: ^7Look at the stars in there. Is...is that the fabled Great Beyond?
hash_47602a9ef4098df9: ^1Shaw: ^7If you saw the dart board in my lab, you would take this rifle from me and melt it down to slag.
hash_47602b9ef4098fac: ^1Diego: ^7A long barrel sounds desirable, si.  But many find it cumbersome when things get...close.
hash_47602c9ef409915f: ^1Bruno: ^7I am no marksman... I mostly prefer punching.
hash_47602d9ef4099312: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ooh, nice scope. Maybe I'll do some bird watching while I'm getting eaten alive.
hash_47627927e7e5540f: ^1Bruno: ^7I know you're unsure if you can fully trust me Scarlett - but your father did.     Surely that counts for something?
hash_479a0ab4a9e5c306: ^1Shaw: ^7If you're looking for a chew-toy, you've picked the wrong Brit.
hash_479a0db4a9e5c81f: ^1Diego: ^7I know how we can get these tigers to leave us alone!    All we need is a giant saucer of milk...
hash_479a0fb4a9e5cb85: ^1Scarlett: ^7Where the hell is this place? Did they even have tigers in ancient Rome?
hash_479d31921f2683e8: ^1Diego: ^7Fire in the hole! Wait... I am supposed to say this before.
hash_479d33921f26874e: ^1Scarlett: ^7No match for modern explosives! I mean- maaagiiic!
hash_47e9a7d645796355: ^1Scarlett: ^7ARGHHH, all I want is a light trigger, full auto receiver, and a big magazine! Is that too much to ask??
hash_480b7a5b53539d66: ^1Bruno: ^7This is not vengeance, it is an act of mercy.
hash_480b7b5b53539f19: ^1Diego: ^7Come to me, monstros! I am serving your last meal!
hash_484e4ba266d8baaa: ^1Diego: ^7The crowd haven't been 'Mortified' like the poor souls on our last trip. There must be a reason - a means - as to why?
hash_486dec6946276328: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shit, I wish I knew how that works. I'd build one myself.
hash_486def6946276841: ^1Bruno: ^7The smell of burnt flesh is all too familiar.
hash_486df16946276ba7: ^1Shaw: ^7Just thinking of some old chums...    Honestly Alfred, you'd be horrified by all this.
hash_48d13bb5c88591c0: ^1Shaw: ^7Not exactly what I hoped for, if I'm being honest.
hash_48d140b5c8859a3f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm going to pack, and re-pack, and re-re-pack this peashooter.      And then I'm gonna shoot this fucking box.
hash_48d141b5c8859bf2: ^1Bruno: ^7I believe we are well past the point where a pistol is useful here.
hash_48d142b5c8859da5: ^1Diego: ^7Very funny, magic box. Remind me to laugh about this later.
hash_48e942b64074c3fe: ^1Bruno: ^7You want to see me angry? It is the last thing you will ever see!!!
hash_48e943b64074c5b1: ^1Diego: ^7I am getting fed up with these screaming muertos!
hash_48e944b64074c764: ^1Shaw: ^7Why come after me? Bruno's a bigger meal, Diego is surely tastier...
hash_4926d4a6e5a49d50: ^1Scarlett: ^7I feel ya, Scepter. You'll get your chance.
hash_4926d6a6e5a4a0b6: ^1Diego: ^7I sense you are ready, my scepter.
hash_4926d7a6e5a4a269: ^1Bruno: ^7My Scepter is ready, should we need it.
hash_4926d9a6e5a4a5cf: ^1Shaw: ^7Healing staff ready. Just got to remember I have it.

hash_495017fab7cb5043: ^1Scarlett: ^7That letter. He told me things. Things I didn't know. Things I need to learn more about.     And the only way to do that is to get him back from that cult.
hash_49d22dd68f931a01: ^1Shaw: ^7Was it too much to ask for stronger wood this time?
hash_49d22fd68f931d67: ^1Bruno: ^7A good defense begins with controlling the avenues of attack.

hash_49f02edc5831b226: ^1Shaw: ^7Come for the storm, stay for the hammer!

hash_4a44c4e127951666: ^1Diego: ^7They call these sub-machine guns. I call them best machine guns.
hash_4a44c5e127951819: ^1Bruno: ^7This may feel like a toy in my hand, but it does not play around.
hash_4a44c7e127951b7f: ^1Shaw: ^7Ever wonder what you get when you mix lead with dead flesh? Let's find out.

hash_4b1194321588f822: ^1Diego: ^7Do not feel shame. I learned from the best!
hash_4b16e2f9bac33b6a: ^1Bruno: ^7Good shot, Scarlett! Now, just do that a thousand more times...
hash_4b16e3f9bac33d1d: ^1Diego: ^7Senorita, you really must tell me where you learned to shoot like that.

hash_4b24a1bfa3477ed9: ^1Diego: ^7You creatures really feel no pain, do you?    This just became less fun.
hash_4b24a2bfa347808c: ^1Shaw: ^7Aw, think man! What do you hope to accomplish with one arm? Just give up!
hash_4b396aea2bba1552: ^1Bruno: ^7If you and your father are so far apart, why do you seek to reconcile now?
hash_4b93cd238cd5047e: ^1Shaw: ^7Cheap firearms? Mystery box may as well be a magnet to a skinflint like me.
hash_4b93cf238cd507e4: ^1Bruno: ^7Ten points to try the box? Perhaps I should try my luck.
hash_4b93d0238cd50997: ^1Diego: ^7Need a better gun? Short on cash? Get to that magic box, pronto!
hash_4b93d2238cd50cfd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Discount guns from the bone-box! Anyone need a better gat?
hash_4b9554983bbeb6f8: ^1Bruno: ^7If I had such destructive power in my youth... Paris would lie in cinders.
hash_4b9555983bbeb8ab: ^1Diego: ^7I am a little bit surprised the whole place has not yet gone up in flames.
hash_4b955a983bbec12a: ^1Shaw: ^7I suppose fire is one of the most FUNDAMENTAL means of creating rapid change... or should I say 'Transmogrification'?
hash_4b996a1c4c69c318: ^1Diego: ^7Our boards say, "No, no, no." But your eyes say, "Flesh, flesh, flesh!"
hash_4b996b1c4c69c4cb: ^1Bruno: ^7I should just grab a board and use it to beat these monsters.
hash_4b99711c4c69cefd: ^1Shaw: ^7If those boards give me two seconds to hear myself think, it'll be worth it!
hash_4bab3e941e16592b: ^1Scarlett: ^7SHIT that's a tiger! So... majestic!      Okay, I'm done! I'm over it!
hash_4bab3f941e165ade: ^1Bruno: ^7Poor beast. I will endeavor to grant you a clean death.
hash_4bab41941e165e44: ^1Shaw: ^7Keep it away! I'm allergic to cat hair! So very, very, violently allergic!!!
hash_4bbf52b5191bcb5f: ^1Shaw: ^7Now what am I supposed to do?
hash_4bfce3ae7bffb456: ^1Shaw: ^7Low on ammo -- again!     I believe there's a basic design flaw in these "firearm" devices...
hash_4bfce6ae7bffb96f: ^1Diego: ^7If I run out of bullets, perhaps I should pick up a spear...     Mm, no. Today is a bullets kind of day.
hash_4bfce8ae7bffbcd5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Need more ammo.     *a-hem!* Maybe that sky-voice wants to get off its ass and help out??
hash_4c1b34b396abb540: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, old man. I need that addled brain of yours.
hash_4c1b37b396abba59: ^1Bruno: ^7No, monsieur, you will not die today.
hash_4c493e537168417e: ^1Diego: ^7Nurse Bruno. I like the sound of that.
hash_4c49415371684697: ^1Shaw: ^7Let me know if I can ever repay you.
hash_4c530140e558399c: ^1Scarlett: ^7He may not relish killing, but Bruno's good at it.

hash_52c6cdebd43b7fb0: ^1Shaw: ^7Lovely, the crowd is ecstatic.    Could you throw me some ammo now please!!!
hash_52c6d2ebd43b882f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I guess I've won the crowd! That's a... good thing?
hash_52c6d3ebd43b89e2: ^1Bruno: ^7Stomp your feet and chant for Bruno! He comes for you next!
hash_52c6d4ebd43b8b95: ^1Diego: ^7I am a legend!    In a drug-induced nightmare world.
hash_52cb1258d448eab3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why don't you try fighting in this outfit, you gold-faced....
hash_52e7738e60f473c3: ^1Shaw: ^7Usually, when I get shortchanged, I'm in an opium den and I don't even notice.    Right now, I'm noticing.
hash_52e7768e60f478dc: ^1Scarlett: ^7I try to never get my hopes up, precisely for moments like this.
hash_52e7788e60f47c42: ^1Diego: ^7I expect more from you, Box. Much, much more.
hash_52e7798e60f47df5: ^1Bruno: ^7A pistol. A fucking pistol. I am trying very hard not to take this personally.
hash_52ed0749c00ceef6: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm no expert on firearms, I'll be the first to tell you, but this? This I understand.
hash_52ed0949c00cf25c: ^1Bruno: ^7Simple, effective, straight to the point. My kind of gun.
hash_52ed0a49c00cf40f: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, this is a weapon I understand.
hash_52ed0c49c00cf775: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not very fancy, but it should get the job done.
hash_53251acaf7ab020b: ^1Shaw: ^7Hey, not bad! Of course, I sniff smelling salts for fun, so...
hash_53251dcaf7ab0724: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wow...okay...kidneys itch...hair hurts...     Any one else want a hit?
hash_53251fcaf7ab0a8a: ^1Diego: ^7That one smelled like Tia Marina's arroz con pollo! My friends, I think we are going to be okay.
hash_532520caf7ab0c3d: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh, that put a fire in my bowels. Like a nice cognac. Or Diego's cooking.
hash_535dfc079d6087f0: ^1Bruno: ^7If you have the tools, use them.
hash_535dfd079d6089a3: ^1Diego: ^7Ha ha! Cower before me! I have the... Fire of the Gods!    Si, that sounds good.
hash_535dff079d608d09: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe I should toss a few up into the crowd. Let's hear em boo then.
hash_535e02079d609222: ^1Shaw: ^7Are we sure explosives aren't against the rules?     Oh, sod it!
hash_536b0d632b0ddd78: ^1Shaw: ^7'The Trial!'... That's it - I knew Alistair had mentioned it before! I feel stupid for not remembering!
hash_536b12632b0de5f7: ^1Scarlett: ^7"The Trial?"... Is that what this is?!     What's the purpose?
hash_536b13632b0de7aa: ^1Bruno: ^7Bah! You insult me with these hors d'Ňďuvres! I want the main course!
hash_536b14632b0de95d: ^1Diego: ^7A handful of gladiators? This is your "Final Challenge?"
hash_5385840d1306ad99: ^1Scarlett: ^7It can't end now. Not like this!
hash_5392c745a01c1183: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come with me, gorgeous. Us girls gotta stick together.
hash_5392c845a01c1336: ^1Bruno: ^7Could have used a few of these in Morocco.
hash_5392c945a01c14e9: ^1Diego: ^7In combat, it is better to be fast than to be strong.
hash_5392ca45a01c169c: ^1Shaw: ^7My favorite type of weapon. Light as a feather, and vicious as the day is long.
hash_539e442596948251: ^1Shaw: ^7Ooof...no money. This is awkward.    Back in a tick!
hash_539e452596948404: ^1Diego: ^7I will need more money to grease these wheels.
hash_539e4625969485b7: ^1Bruno: ^7Not only do the dead haunt us, they laugh at our empty wallets.
hash_539e47259694876a: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the hell do these things need money for anyway?
hash_53bbd387da10f169: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody nice head-shot, Bruno! I knew I'd rub off on you!
hash_53bbd487da10f31c: ^1Diego: ^7You popped them like champagne, Bruno! We should celebrate!
hash_53bbd687da10f682: ^1Scarlett: ^7He may not relish killing, but Bruno's damn good at it.
hash_53fd2bfc746518be: ^1Shaw: ^7Ha! I did it! And the crowd goes wild!
hash_53fd2dfc74651c24: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps I should learn to throw axes? Non, guns work just fine.
hash_53fd2efc74651dd7: ^1Diego: ^7You fought well, senor, but you are no Diego.
hash_540a1cb4353c73dc: ^1Shaw: ^7You can hear the blood lust in the roar of the crowd - They're LOVING IT!     It's just a big cock fight to them!!
hash_542e04dc209aa6e0: ^1Shaw: ^7You know, once you get past the texture...    Okay, there is no getting past the texture.
hash_542e09dc209aaf5f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know what'll kill me first, the rot-jockeys, or Shaw's elixirs.
hash_542e0adc209ab112: ^1Bruno: ^7Hm. I've had worse. I do not see why the others complain.
hash_542e0bdc209ab2c5: ^1Diego: ^7Hm. Spicy, but not too spi--OH! Now it burns!
hash_54405f69c1edd783: ^1Scarlett: ^7The stench... Whatever that Priest is trying to do, he's throwing a lot of bodies at it.  (disgusted with self)  Eugh - good one Scar, that was appropriate.
hash_5453d6cea6408663: ^1Shaw: ^7Nobody comes here anymore -- it's too bleedin' crowded.
hash_5453dbcea6408ee2: ^1Diego: ^7I may be a "people person" but this is getting ridiculous.
hash_5453dccea6409095: ^1Bruno: ^7What ever happened to the glory of single combat?
hash_54567fa4e7d67253: ^1Scarlett: ^7Gonna end up like Shaw if I keep this up.
hash_545680a4e7d67406: ^1Bruno: ^7Now I know what it is like to be a dog sniffing another's derriere.
hash_545681a4e7d675b9: ^1Diego: ^7Mm. They say fine perfume always contains one foul-smelling component.    This one has at least six.
hash_545682a4e7d6776c: ^1Shaw: ^7I've heard this referred to as "aromatherapy"....coincidentally, that's my term for "sniffing glue".
hash_5462ce014bad1cd1: ^1Shaw: ^7These things always have some weak spot, some vulnerability to exploit.
hash_5462cf014bad1e84: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, so there is a chink in your armor.
hash_5462d0014bad2037: ^1Bruno: ^7There! I found your Achilles heel!     On your back.
hash_54736b77e79e1839: ^1Diego: ^7Diego's free clinic is open for business!
hash_54736c77e79e19ec: ^1Shaw: ^7And here's your dose of bad medicine.
hash_548fc8a0c0bd24d6: ^1Bruno: ^7Well done, Scarlett! If we must  fight this war, then hold nothing back!
hash_548fc9a0c0bd2689: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett is very much her father's daughter -- but she fights like twice the man.
hash_548fcaa0c0bd283c: ^1Shaw: ^7Put on a good show for the crowd, dear girl! After all, they're next.
hash_5490320df63beb69: ^1Scarlett: ^7Can't say we didn't screw that up.
hash_54daceef808d9fa4: ^1Diego: ^7Perhaps now we get a real challenge, si?
hash_54dacfef808da157: ^1Bruno: ^7Throw whatever you have at us. It will make no difference.
hash_55776637da423a38: ^1Shaw: ^7Step right up, worm-brains! I've got death in two flavors!
hash_55776d37da42461d: ^1Diego: ^7The Dragon awakens. And the Viper, too.
hash_558670a0770e3798: ^1Bruno: ^7To see a man melt, even one that is not a man...    It burns into the memory.
hash_558673a0770e3cb1: ^1Scarlett: ^7This will be like a birthday party!     Except you know - with acid - not confetti.
hash_558676a0770e41ca: ^1Shaw: ^7Dearie me! I do believe it looks like ACID FUCKING RAIN!

hash_55abb0476d64d998: ^1Bruno: ^7The Hammer of Valhalla feels ready for battle.
hash_55abb1476d64db4b: ^1Diego: ^7Hammer, my friend, are you ready to take a few swings?
hash_55abb3476d64deb1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hammer's humming. Must be ready to go.
hash_55abb6476d64e3ca: ^1Shaw: ^7Hammer's at full charge. Strange, how it acts almost as a battery.
hash_5617e9af7a10a469: ^1Shaw: ^7These walls appear to be working together, setting the prices...     They've cornered the market!
hash_57033a7749c9fc7b: ^1Shaw: ^7An old man with a gimpy eye just put you down, Big Fella. Time to rethink your career, yes?
hash_57033d7749ca0194: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keep sending these guys, I'll keep putting them down.
hash_57033f7749ca04fa: ^1Diego: ^7Do those helmets come in my size? Just kidding -- it would be a crime to cover my face.
hash_5703407749ca06ad: ^1Bruno: ^7All the armor in the world could not save you from me.
hash_572e5ffb2737ec06: ^1Shaw: ^7Just keep shooting, Stanton. Don't overthink it -- just aim and squeeze.
hash_572e61fb2737ef6c: ^1Bruno: ^7I am not here to impress the crowd. I am here to finish what we started.
hash_572e62fb2737f11f: ^1Diego: ^7It does not matter what year this is -- the legend of Diego Necalli is timeless!!
hash_572e64fb2737f485: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll cut through all of you rot-jockey bastards!
hash_573dc675a29633f3: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not sure why these openings are even here. Seems like they harm the integrity of the structure.
hash_573dc975a296390c: ^1Scarlett: ^7If they wanna get to me, they're gonna have to work for it.
hash_573dcb75a2963c72: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, Diego, I am sure the crowd is very riveted by your woodwork.
hash_573dcc75a2963e25: ^1Bruno: ^7I suggest everyone do I do if we expect to survive.
hash_57788f0eb41980fd: ^1Scarlett: ^7My father disappeared from my life when I was twelve. It took me a long time to come out the other side - to make my own life - figure out what I wanted to do.     Then he sends me the letter.
hash_57d6aa76040a2b46: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's a lot of it around Bruno... Madness comes for us all.
hash_57d70547fc613d79: ^1Shaw: ^7Leave a few for us, Diego!    Ah, screw it: kill 'em all.
hash_57d70747fc6140df: ^1Bruno: ^7Diego fights every fight as if it is his last. And yet, I think he will outlive us all.
hash_57d70847fc614292: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't get too cocky, Diego. There's still plenty more to kill!
hash_57e48c3d6477b33b: ^1Shaw: ^7My, this crowd is depressing... but it's nothing I can't self-medicate.
hash_57e4913d6477bbba: ^1Diego: ^7You see? I am no narcissist, I do not need their approval...
hash_57e4923d6477bd6d: ^1Bruno: ^7You are not the first to hate me! And you will not be the last.

hash_58ee30835f5537aa: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn! I could get used to this.

hash_58ee46722d9825d7: ^1Bruno: ^7A hard rain has come for you, beasts!
hash_58ee47722d98278a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Is this what they mean by, "storming the castle?"
hash_594239fb58c4af7b: ^1Bruno: ^7What does this lever do?    Tres amusant.
hash_59423afb58c4b12e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Release the gear lock, drop the counterweight, and... nice! Rotating death column.
hash_59423ffb58c4b9ad: ^1Shaw: ^7We must endeavour to sever head from cadaver!    To divorce a corpse from its head of course!    I suddenly don't feel well!
hash_59467822d3a16aa8: ^1Bruno: ^7No ammo? But this is an arena! There should ammo everywhere!
hash_59467922d3a16c5b: ^1Diego: ^7Out of bullets. Bueno: I must demonstrate my...other talents.
hash_59467b22d3a16fc1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey, rot-jockies, can we take a quick break? I need to restock.      Yeah, didn't think so.
hash_59467e22d3a174da: ^1Shaw: ^7It's all gone pear-shaped! My bullets have abandoned me!!
hash_594f0f73552290e8: ^1Bruno: ^7So you tasted my blood! I wonder, was it worth it?
hash_594f10735522929b: ^1Diego: ^7Suicide by Diego! There are worse ways to go.
hash_594f157355229b1a: ^1Shaw: ^7You did notice I've a weapon, yes?! Fires bits of metal? Makes big holes?
hash_59bf879da6db17d8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Need more ammo. No way am I fighting these freaks hand to hand the rest of the day.
hash_59bf899da6db1b3e: ^1Diego: ^7This weapon should not be empty so soon. There must be some mistake.
hash_59bf8c9da6db2057: ^1Shaw: ^7No ammo? Well, this is a bit of a pickle. Not a good pickle, either. One that's gone a floppy in the brine.
hash_59cafb2dcd24a7e8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, that one's not so bad.     Ohhh...there goes my spleen...
hash_59cafe2dcd24ad01: ^1Bruno: ^7That is a unique flavor.    Not good. But unique.
hash_59cb002dcd24b067: ^1Shaw: ^7What does this one do? It's like rolling the dice. Come on, sixes...!
hash_59ed7ee51936d017: ^1Scarlett: ^7Need more ammo.   (calling out)  *a-hem!* Maybe that sky-voice wants to get up and help out??
hash_5a05088b92403c31: ^1Shaw: ^7What am I tasting? Hmmm...Butter. Salt. Licorice. Dandelion. Human-Flesh. Raspberry. Milkweed...
hash_5a05098b92403de4: ^1Diego: ^7I should really...ask Shaw for...his medical license...
hash_5a050a8b92403f97: ^1Bruno: ^7I am grateful Shaw makes these elixirs...but I refuse to sign his release form.
hash_5a050b8b9240414a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tastes like cough syrup laced with apples and arsenic.
hash_5a1a148d65075243: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well, at least the axe-guys have the good sense to cover their rotten faces.
hash_5a1a158d650753f6: ^1Bruno: ^7Who were you, my oversized adversary? Did you seek glory in the arena? Look what you've become.
hash_5a1a168d650755a9: ^1Diego: ^7¬°Ven aca, carnicero! I am the finest piece of beefcake you will ever try to butcher.
hash_5a1a178d6507575c: ^1Shaw: ^7Axe me no questions and I'll sell you no lives.     See what I did there?
hash_5a2562cd2fa07f06: ^1Shaw: ^7Fun fact: a scorpion's anus is right behind its stinger vesicle!    I think...I think he's feeling...MUCH better now!
hash_5a2564cd2fa0826c: ^1Bruno: ^7Bon travail, magic scorpion. Bruno will take care of you.
hash_5a2565cd2fa0841f: ^1Diego: ^7What pit of Hell did this thing crawl out of...?
hash_5a2567cd2fa08785: ^1Scarlett: ^7Holy shit! This scorpion isn't... indigenous, is it?      Best not turn over any rocks.
hash_5a292e8fc6551b1e: ^1Scarlett: ^7If we can solve all their riddles and defeat all their 'warriors', then the doorway will be opened.      Fuck - Why did he have to be right? Why did he have to be telling the truth?!
hash_5a4ee4b904cb177d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay Shaw - This sure looks like history. That's one of your specialities - Right? History? Even if it's just because you're older than Methuselah.
hash_5a99e83f9de10102: ^1Bruno: ^7I swear, camel urine would taste better than this.
hash_5ab3365060ba34ea: ^1Bruno: ^7This one is rotten! Bring me something fresh!

hash_5ad8a5448a989e56: ^1Diego: ^7That face of yours is a hell of a thing to wake up to.
hash_5aebd7660083dbdb: ^1Shaw: ^7There. All better. Now kill two ghouls and call me in the morning.
hash_5aebda660083e0f4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Remember this moment, Diego. I know I will.
hash_5aebdd660083e60d: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope this has taught you a lesson. But I very much doubt it.
hash_5aef8ea07c3b4d02: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right. It burns you dead creeps, doesn't it?
hash_5b342dec612fc673: ^1Shaw: ^7Sorry, old bean, but it was brains versus blight, and brains always wins.
hash_5b3430ec612fcb8c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's face it, pug-ugly, this thing between us isn't working.
hash_5b3432ec612fcef2: ^1Diego: ^7Alas, you are now roadkill and I am still the prettiest thing here.
hash_5b3433ec612fd0a5: ^1Bruno: ^7Enough! Just die, you evil sack of vomit!
hash_5b73e1a7e3d19328: ^1Bruno: ^7Were you always like this, little man? Or did the rage eat you up like a cancer?
hash_5b73e2a7e3d194db: ^1Diego: ^7You may be a tiny little monster, but you are my tiny little monster.
hash_5b73e7a7e3d19d5a: ^1Shaw: ^7I know what you do. Soon as I lob you off, you'll stomp around the battlefield like billy-big-balls.
hash_5b8b94c55323e389: ^1Shaw: ^7They say I'm smart as a whip. Usually when I point this bloody great beast at them.
hash_5b8b95c55323e53c: ^1Diego: ^7Time to be sorry you ever met me.
hash_5b8b96c55323e6ef: ^1Bruno: ^7Fire and steel is all I have to give.
hash_5bb142e0d222d3f8: ^1Bruno: ^7I shall have to choose my shots carefully. If only I had always done so.
hash_5bb143e0d222d5ab: ^1Diego: ^7Tactics! Strategy! These are the weapons of civilized men.
hash_5bb145e0d222d911: ^1Scarlett: ^7You were built for headshots, weren't you?     And wouldn't ya know it? All these heads need shooting!
hash_5bb148e0d222de2a: ^1Shaw: ^7I enjoy precise, fiddly tools as much as the next scientist, but not in the bloody arena!
hash_5becf122b70b4058: ^1Scarlett: ^7I think I'll be tossing your ugly ass, first chance I get.
hash_5becf322b70b43be: ^1Diego: ^7Calmate, muneco. Anger never solves anything.     Actually, that is not entirely true.
hash_5becf422b70b4571: ^1Bruno: ^7He may be ugly on the outside, but on the inside...he is also ugly.
hash_5becf622b70b48d7: ^1Shaw: ^7So much anger - maybe he banged his shin...?
hash_5bfda25b018de160: ^1Bruno: ^7I sense that petit homme has killed more men than I could ever dream.
hash_5bfda35b018de313: ^1Diego: ^7Something about him is... offensive. I cannot put my finger on it.
hash_5bfda55b018de679: ^1Scarlett: ^7That little troll has delusions of grandeur. Who the hell does he think he is?
hash_5bfda85b018deb92: ^1Shaw: ^7He's ferocious, I'll give him that! But does he need to be so... mean?
hash_5bfe47a8e6a14ed8: ^1Diego: ^7I prefer dogs to cats. Especially after today.
hash_5bfe48a8e6a1508b: ^1Bruno: ^7I used to have a rule: "No children, no animals."     It seems I'll kill anything now.
hash_5bfe49a8e6a1523e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Growl at me, that's what you get.
hash_5bfe4ea8e6a15abd: ^1Shaw: ^7I'll never read the Jungle Book the same way again.
hash_5c285e8ebae28108: ^1Diego: ^7Senor Shaw! How many fingers am I holding up?
hash_5c285f8ebae282bb: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope I got the dosage right. Hard to tell if you have built up a tolerance.
hash_5c28608ebae2846e: ^1Scarlett: ^7You okay, Shaw? You didn't self-medicate, did you?
hash_5c42ee5a2863bca0: ^1Shaw: ^7To be perfectly honest, I was a little preoccupied with the massive occult ritual unfolding around us...    The last thing I was interested in was the fucking floor!
hash_5ca0c20e3ec29c59: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, that explains the smell of ozone in here.
hash_5ca0c50e3ec2a172: ^1Scarlett: ^7Watch it! This one's a walking Tesla coil.
hash_5ca8c682c6c13b50: ^1Shaw: ^7Poor, rotten buggers never had a chance!
hash_5ca8cb82c6c143cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hell of a kick, there, but it's worse for you.
hash_5caa4e1ee1e26918: ^1Scarlett: ^7Need to grab more cartridges. These last few won't last long.
hash_5caa501ee1e26c7e: ^1Diego: ^7I am nearly out of ammo...    Not to worry. Fantasma will take care of me. We have a special bond...I think.
hash_5caa511ee1e26e31: ^1Bruno: ^7My weapon is nearly as empty as Diego's brain.
hash_5caa531ee1e27197: ^1Shaw: ^7Hello??? Great Beyond?? My Ammo situation's getting a bit dodgy. Anything you want to do about that?
hash_5cb7238501423560: ^1Diego: ^7Anyone else need a light? Just scream and I will get to you.
hash_5cb7248501423713: ^1Bruno: ^7This should have been my weapon all along.
hash_5cb72a8501424145: ^1Shaw: ^7I wonder if this could light my hookah...
hash_5cb7617db465df86: ^1Shaw: ^7I feel like a fool. I don't have the coin and still I tried.
hash_5cb7637db465e2ec: ^1Bruno: ^7Do I look like a wealthy man? No. Do I look like a man you want to extort? No!
hash_5cb7647db465e49f: ^1Diego: ^7How am I supposed to carry mone
hash_5cb7655a725c943d: ^1Bruno: ^7That artifact the Priest had... I have seen its like before.    I will fold it in half and feed it to him! May he squeeze it out sideways.
hash_5cb7667db465e805: ^1Scarlett: ^7Doesn't matter where you are, or when you are, money talks.
hash_5cb94bfd87646a88: ^1Shaw: ^7They say at one point, the Earth was littered with Prima Materia. Couldn't swing a dead cat without hitting some.
hash_5cb950fd87647307: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sooner we get done here, the sooner we get back to the damned cave. What waits for us beyond the door?
hash_5cb951fd876474ba: ^1Bruno: ^7Dying changes the way you see the world. Ever since I have returned, I see things...differently.
hash_5cb952fd8764766d: ^1Diego: ^7I like this arena. Plenty of things to kill, thousands of adoring fans chanting my name. This place just "gets" me.

hash_5d2e568c14fbd56c: ^1Scarlett: ^7When you gotta go, you gotta go.
hash_5d2e588c14fbd8d2: ^1Diego: ^7It was a sad end to your existence. But to be fair...your entire existence was sad.
hash_5d36ec697dcceed1: ^1Scarlett: ^7You really want to know what my father said in his Letter? Let me give you a nice little nugget of 'fuck You'..     'My dear daughter. I want you to know that I do not blame you for this. No matter how much you were responsible. Please - Live your life.'
hash_5d4455ab61805c32: ^1Scarlett: ^7Real funny, box. And it just gets funnier. Every. Time.
hash_5d7beb59697e7a06: ^1Shaw: ^7Looks like you're allergic to lead. Chemistry wins again!
hash_5d7bed59697e7d6c: ^1Bruno: ^7Fire at the lumps on its neck!
hash_5d7bee59697e7f1f: ^1Diego: ^7You look hurt, monstro. Did Diego hit a nerve?
hash_5dbbe65f3b1a5a30: ^1Diego: ^7They say size does not matter.....I beg to differ.
hash_5dbbe75f3b1a5be3: ^1Bruno: ^7I do believe I have just become a one-man regiment.
hash_5dbbe85f3b1a5d96: ^1Scarlett: ^7Pug-uglies...! I've got a big surprise for you...!
hash_5dbbed5f3b1a6615: ^1Shaw: ^7I've got arms like noodles, a bad liver, and a touch of sciatica. And I'm expected to tote this around?
hash_5e0804af4de98af7: ^1Bruno: ^7A pistol.    I am trying very hard not to take this personally.
hash_5e14b7c129f161e6: ^1Shaw: ^7Jolly good, Diego! Way to pop a noggin!
hash_5e14b9c129f1654c: ^1Bruno: ^7And so we rejoice. Diego lives to brag another day.
hash_5e14bcc129f16a65: ^1Scarlett: ^7Spray that gray, senor. Just not in my direction.
hash_5e233d093ade9791: ^1Shaw: ^7Cheers, mate! Promise I won't use them all at once!
hash_5e233e093ade9944: ^1Diego: ^7Ammo. Amor. Is it coincidence that they sound so much alike?
hash_5e233f093ade9af7: ^1Bruno: ^7Tres bien. A gun without bullets is just a big paperweight - Good for bludgeoning, but little else.
hash_5e2340093ade9caa: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll take it - and put it to good use.
hash_5e31684ac2fe9503: ^1Shaw: ^7I really can't tell if Bruno is getting upset. The man suffers from "resting narky-face".
hash_5e316b4ac2fe9a1c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Where'd you learn that, Bruno? Your soldier days? Or your mafia days?
hash_5e316d4ac2fe9d82: ^1Diego: ^7You are a great soldier, Bruno Delacroix. Now if we can just get you to crack a smile...
hash_5e4aa701d4837492: ^1Shaw: ^7They're hemming you in, Diego. Might I suggest getting out of there...?
hash_5e5c39c60bb33460: ^1Bruno: ^7Some say money is the root of all evil. I say it is the route to destroying evil.
hash_5e5c3ac60bb33613: ^1Diego: ^7They say money cannot buy happiness. I say everything else is for sale.
hash_5e5c3cc60bb33979: ^1Scarlett: ^7Points, money, whatever the hell you are - I'm investing in firepower.
hash_5e5c3fc60bb33e92: ^1Shaw: ^7Sounds like I just got a pay rise!
hash_5e8f2cff1689bdfe: ^1Diego: ^7You do realize you are getting overrun, yes?
hash_5e8f2fff1689c317: ^1Shaw: ^7Bruno, you lummox, get clear of those flesh-eaters!
hash_5ed6d154bf7443d0: ^1Bruno: ^7Consider yourself one of the lucky ones.
hash_5ed6d254bf744583: ^1Diego: ^7I could have been a dentist. Look at how quickly I removed its teeth!
hash_5ed6d454bf7448e9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Quicker you fall down, the quicker I get back to what matters.
hash_5ed6d754bf744e02: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, if you wanted to keep your head, you shouldn't have eyeballed me like that.
hash_5f0fe70c8468a321: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe this is my redemption. Maybe I am meant to cleanse my soul with blood and vomit.     Such is my life.
hash_5f137dc2b47babfe: ^1Shaw: ^7And the crowd goes batty for Shaw!
hash_5f137fc2b47baf64: ^1Bruno: ^7Thousands of voices, all shouting for death...
hash_5fb45f6edf6d7cb8: ^1Diego: ^7What an audience! Shame they are so crazy.
hash_5ff0c89803b89c78: ^1Scarlett: ^7I think this means... I'm a champion.     Oh, Diego's gonna love that.
hash_5ff0ca9803b89fde: ^1Diego: ^7Oh! My heart! She is full...    Gracias, mi amigos. Gracias.
hash_5ff0cb9803b8a191: ^1Bruno: ^7Yes, we are having such fun today, are we not?!
hash_5ff0cd9803b8a4f7: ^1Shaw: ^7Shaw is the best! Stanton is our man! Ra Ra, Zeus boom bah, he shall pass the test! HOORAY!     Did I do that Right?
hash_600f49a088f9fac1: ^1Shaw: ^7Well I'm happy the mob is happy! Sort of...
hash_600f4ba088f9fe27: ^1Bruno: ^7Cheer for me! Cheer for le sauvage!
hash_601ed534a0890ae1: ^1Shaw: ^7Now, I'm no ammo-ologist, but I think my weapon is nearly out of bullets.
hash_601ed634a0890c94: ^1Diego: ^7Once more, I got distracted and forgot to count my bullets...
hash_601ed834a0890ffa: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I die in a fucking hallucination because I ran out of bullets, I am gonna be livid.
hash_6041463bfe9d7b63: ^1Shaw: ^7Diego certainly knows where to shoot them, doesn't he?
hash_6041493bfe9d807c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Good shot, Diego! Now stop admiring your handiwork and mow down the rest!
hash_60414c3bfe9d8595: ^1Bruno: ^7Merveilleux. Another Diego head-shot I will hear about until the end of time.
hash_607e192ae6e89274: ^1Bruno: ^7These are unnatural forces. We accept their help without question. Sooner or later, this will bite us in the rear.
hash_6085ec73f0b5855b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Of course fire burns us and not them! Because fuck the laws of chemistry, that's why!
hash_6085ed73f0b5870e: ^1Bruno: ^7What dark magic saves the monstres from the flames? I would
hash_6085ee73f0b588c1: ^1Diego: ^7Something protects the demons from the fire! Cheating bastardos!
hash_6085ef73f0b58a74: ^1Shaw: ^7The bloody shamblers are fire-proof! Head for the hills!    Oh dear - No hills!
hash_6090b995aefc9073: ^1Shaw: ^7You cowards in the stalls - You think this is fun?! Why don't you come down here and have a go - Get your hands all covered in blood and dung?!
hash_60ac33ae710b4bfd: ^1Bruno: ^7So - You ready to tell me what happened to your eye? I am still curious, Shaw...
hash_60c75fddd99bd5bc: ^1Diego: ^7Me llamo Diego! Y soy un gladiador!
hash_60c760ddd99bd76f: ^1Bruno: ^7One mistake, and now you bleed to death. C'est la vie.
hash_60d0a2116fe02835: Players did not kill all champions
hash_60d79ff743e500ee: ^1Diego: ^7I get the feeling you are ashamed of your past bruno. That must be hard. I am very proud of mine.    Remind me to tell you of my experiences during the Battle of Ciudad Juarez...
hash_619fd3e0f509c300: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's hope the chunks don't get caught in the cogs, I really don't feel like digging them out.
hash_619fd5e0f509c666: ^1Diego: ^7This should hold back my throngs of admirers.
hash_619fd8e0f509cb7f: ^1Shaw: ^7I've got a funny idea!    Eugh! That wasn't it!
hash_61b4f8b3ed24ce91: ^1Shaw: ^7Aw, was that a pat on the back? Right back at ya, mate!
hash_61b4f9b3ed24d044: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes. Everyone wants a piece of Diego.
hash_61b4fab3ed24d1f7: ^1Bruno: ^7I may be a big target, but I also hit back harder.
hash_61d81f03002b6a40: ^1Shaw: ^7Just firing this thing will probably shake me to pieces. But what a way to go.
hash_61d82503002b7472: ^1Bruno: ^7Our enemies are about to get "the full Bruno."    Heaven help them.
hash_61d82603002b7625: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, Box, you honor me. I promise to be worthy of this gift.
hash_61eb33dd8128ea7e: ^1Bruno: ^7C'mon, Bruno, your friends, they are counting on you.
hash_62046aa5229eee40: ^1Bruno: ^7I will rip you apart, monstre. Even if it must be one limb at a time.
hash_62046ba5229eeff3: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, Mierda. I meant to shoot the other arm.
hash_62046da5229ef359: ^1Scarlett: ^7These freaks don't mind losing a limb. Let's see how they like losing a face...
hash_620470a5229ef872: ^1Shaw: ^7Why in the bluest balls are you still trying? You got no arm!
hash_62152ad65458eeae: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, ha-ha! Let's give the scoped rifle to the geezer with the milky eye! Cheeky devil-box.
hash_627a324df9686c7f: ^1Diego: ^7It is funny that you ask... I noticed 'strange' markings on the floor of the chamber where we first arrived. They may have 'use... ful... ness...'

hash_64384b7137cfb9b5: ^1Shaw: ^7You know what? I'm used to disappointments. What's one more?
hash_64738439c184e818: ^1Shaw: ^7Off you go, mate. And this time, stay there.
hash_64738939c184f097: ^1Scarlett: ^7Should've picked on someone your own size, you dumb son of a bitch.
hash_64738a39c184f24a: ^1Bruno: ^7There had better not be more where you came from. I grow weary of sending you back to Hell.
hash_64738b39c184f3fd: ^1Diego: ^7The battle continues -- but now with a few less flying axes.
hash_64864a3db15ed5a6: ^1Diego: ^7Oh... I understand you now.     Sorry Shaw. From time to time your English phrasing is 'confusing'.
hash_64956298226bee18: ^1Scarlett: ^7I won't lie -- this is gonna hurt.
hash_64956498226bf17e: ^1Diego: ^7You ready for this, muertos? I think not.
hash_64956798226bf697: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on, hammer, let's make some friends.
hash_64a392f19bb1af90: ^1Diego: ^7Like moths to the flame! Though in all fairness - the flame did go to them.
hash_64a393f19bb1b143: ^1Bruno: ^7Stop screaming. It will make no difference.
hash_64a394f19bb1b2f6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aw, quit complaining. It'll be a whole lot hotter where you're headed.
hash_64a399f19bb1bb75: ^1Shaw: ^7Spontaneous combustion! I always wanted to witness that particular phenomenon for myself!
hash_64df765a76d663e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay you Golden Sadistic son of a...     Not only am I going to jump through ALL the hoops, I'm going to entertain your stupid followers while I do it.
hash_651b636d1106b0a0: ^1Shaw: ^7Yeah... *sorry.* I think I'll let someone else take this.
hash_651b686d1106b91f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll let one of the boys take this.
hash_651b696d1106bad2: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde, that is not what I wanted.
hash_651b6a6d1106bc85: ^1Diego: ^7That won't do for Diego. Maybe for someone less particular?
hash_65344c85ec311bd8: ^1Diego: ^7Few get close enough to strike me. Bravo...
hash_65344e85ec311f3e: ^1Scarlett: ^7You just had to be a problem!
hash_6535eca021a2b57e: ^1Bruno: ^7Yes, Hammer, when the moment is right...
hash_65375bb012531ba0: ^1Bruno: ^7They say scent triggers memories. Right now I am remembering the reptile house at the Paris zoo.
hash_65375cb012531d53: ^1Diego: ^7Ahh...a delicate yet complex bouquet.     Altho, my tongue jutht fell athleep...
hash_65375eb0125320b9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Folks always said I stick my nose where it doesn't belong.      Some things never change.
hash_653761b0125325d2: ^1Shaw: ^7Inhale strange substance? No worries. I've been training for this all my life.
hash_6547aa0df23a3110: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well it has big bullets and I can shoot them. I'll...make it work.
hash_6547ac0df23a3476: ^1Diego: ^7Bah... the true pistolero aims with his instinct, not with a scope.
hash_6547ad0df23a3629: ^1Bruno: ^7Might as well grip the barrel and use it as a club.
hash_6547af0df23a398f: ^1Shaw: ^7I miss my microscope. The world through that lens is far less upsetting.
hash_65544583121abe20: ^1Bruno: ^7Death to my enemies, life to my friends.
hash_65544683121abfd3: ^1Diego: ^7You are all very sick. I have the cure.    Now open wide and say, "Ah"...
hash_65544b83121ac852: ^1Shaw: ^7I've got a bloody big scepter and I'm not afraid to use it!
hash_65d3f085107be5e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw! Look alive! Get away from those freaks!
hash_65d3f285107be94a: ^1Diego: ^7There are too many, Shaw. Keep your distance from them!
hash_65d3f385107beafd: ^1Bruno: ^7Get away from them, Shaw. Do not force me to come rescue you.
hash_65ea36e2c15b9b91: ^1Scarlett: ^7Should've picked on someone your own size.
hash_661e8eb1bafca259: ^1Scarlett: ^7Heck of a kick, there, but it's worse for you.
hash_661e903f708e7688: ^1Bruno: ^7My mother was committed to an 'institution' by my father. He believer her mad, I believe she had very 'normal' problems.
hash_664efbcdf690cf3a: ^1Diego: ^7Get up, Shaw. Who will say the crazy things if you die on us?
hash_666919bd1f78e8ce: ^1Shaw: ^7Diego, my boy, I'm starting to believe all the fuss about you.
hash_66691bbd1f78ec34: ^1Bruno: ^7Merci. Now let us kill these beasts together.
hash_66691ebd1f78f14d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Thanks, Diego. Don't let it go to your head.
hash_667f068ca8c1a4a4: ^1Shaw: ^7You're in a tight spot there, Bruno. My advice? Get out!

hash_6a8f79b7ce871510: ^1Bruno: ^7It seems the crowd is unhappy with me.
hash_6a8f7ab7ce8716c3: ^1Diego: ^7Fortunately my ego is impervious to such mierda.
hash_6a8f7fb7ce871f42: ^1Shaw: ^7The crowd hates me, yes... but frankly - I'm just chuffed to bits that I'm not dead!

hash_6a964616e129bad9: ^1Bruno: ^7Again, the axe-man comes. And again, I must chop him down.
hash_6a964816e129be3f: ^1Shaw: ^7The axe-thrower's back for an encore. Can't say I liked his act the first time.

hash_6aedd8456d90c183: ^1Scarlett: ^7If the crowd wants blood...     Let's give them blood.
hash_6aedd9456d90c336: ^1Bruno: ^7Oui, the contraption is barbaric... Mais je suis un sauvage.
hash_6aedda456d90c4e9: ^1Diego: ^7Let's give the crowd something to cheer about.
hash_6aff0e4e6dc68921: ^1Scarlett: ^7The cure was worse than the disease.
hash_6b17bb2a43917470: ^1Diego: ^7You cannot go wrong with Diego leading the charge.
hash_6b17bd2a439177d6: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's about as good as it gets, fellas!
hash_6b17c22a43918055: ^1Shaw: ^7Dare I hope my luck is turning?
hash_6b430cfc931a3d86: ^1Diego: ^7Nice and sharp, no? I shave with this knife -- even my face!
hash_6b430dfc931a3f39: ^1Bruno: ^7The arena, I fear...is where I belong.
hash_6b430ffc931a429f: ^1Shaw: ^7Pardon me, mate, but I believe you've sprung a leak!
hash_6b60dbf84e788bfc: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe following advice from mysterious voices in a cave was not such a smart idea.
hash_6c07f5ba78616890: ^1Diego: ^7Strange, how those cold ones keep their distance...watching us. I have seen that look before...    Sister Josefa? Is that you?
hash_6c07f6ba78616a43: ^1Bruno: ^7There! See how the blue ones creep away? Like a child caught with a cookie.
hash_6c07f7ba78616bf6: ^1Scarlett: ^7What's up with the blue ones? They seem to be avoiding us.
hash_6c07fcba78617475: ^1Shaw: ^7Aw, those water-ghouls are adorable. In an "I'll kill you when you're not looking," kind of way...
hash_6c0cc92e736883b8: ^1Diego: ^7Surely this booing is not for me...
hash_6c0cca2e7368856b: ^1Bruno: ^7Brave men behind their golden masks... Let's see them fight.
hash_6c0ccb2e7368871e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't listen to them, Scarlett!      You're still alive.
hash_6c0cd02e73688f9d: ^1Shaw: ^7I do have feelings, you know!    This is actually really hard...
hash_6c3e08421456c7eb: ^1Diego: ^7Keep that up, Shaw, and the crowd will love you almost as much as me!
hash_6c3e0a421456cb51: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like Shaw's sobering up.     I'm not sure if that's good or bad.
hash_6c8764c8a7e879a8: ^1Bruno: ^7Scarlett! They are closing in on you, chere!
hash_6c8765c8a7e87b5b: ^1Diego: ^7Senorita Scarlett! You need to move, chica!
hash_6c876ac8a7e883da: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett, I'm no expert, but I'm pretty sure you don't want to get surrounded.
hash_6c8f5b5227bc77d0: ^1Shaw: ^7They kind of sound like piggies when they crawl about--    I hate piggies.
hash_6c8f605227bc804f: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't feel good about killing you. Don't feel anything, actually.
hash_6c8f615227bc8202: ^1Bruno: ^7Legs, no legs, you all have to go.
hash_6c8f625227bc83b5: ^1Diego: ^7I had to save what little dignity you had, monstro. You are welcome.
hash_6c9bc832a5ff8b58: ^1Bruno: ^7More big cats. It just feels wrong to destroy them.
hash_6c9bc932a5ff8d0b: ^1Diego: ^7I once made love on a tiger-skin rug. It smelled better than these beasts, I assure you.
hash_6c9bce32a5ff958a: ^1Shaw: ^7Tyger, Tyger, burning bright, spare me your unholy bite.
hash_6ca1f8c3a83a64d0: ^1Diego: ^7Come, Scarlett. I cannot do this without you...to cheer me on.
hash_6ca1f9c3a83a6683: ^1Bruno: ^7Get up, mademoiselle. We cannot afford to lose you.
hash_6ca1ffc3a83a70b5: ^1Shaw: ^7If we ever find your father, I don't want to explain how I let you die. So up you go, girl!
hash_6cd68d25562f28b4: ^1Scarlett: ^7I am never gonna get your stink off me now--!
hash_6cd68f25562f2c1a: ^1Diego: ^7Sueltame, monstro! ¬°SUELTAME!    I said let go! Do you not
hash_6cd69025562f2dcd: ^1Bruno: ^7Agh, not with your tongue--!    That is your tongue, oui?
hash_6ce9af39bff0edde: ^1Shaw: ^7Just where did she learn to shoot like that?? Did the Sisters take her to the range after Morning Prayer??
hash_6ce9b239bff0f2f7: ^1Diego: ^7Keep that up, Scarlett, and we may survive this nightmare!
hash_6cf6e60bba7601db: ^1Scarlett: ^7You really want to know what my father said in his Letter? Let me give you a nice little nugget of 'screw You'..     'My dear daughter. I want you to know that I do not blame you for this. No matter how much you were responsible. Please - Live your life.'
hash_6d0076437b222a3e: ^1Diego: ^7Do not fight them all at once, Scarlett! I can teach you to
hash_6d0077437b222bf1: ^1Bruno: ^7Watch your back, Scarlett! Do not let them corner you!
hash_6d0079437b222f57: ^1Shaw: ^7Listen to your Uncle Stan, dear: that crowd will swallow you whole!
hash_6da2da3307ea7916: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not relish violence, but, oh, am I about to dish it out...
hash_6dace95ebedfe079: ^1Shaw: ^7Not sure if it was the hypo or your cologne, but it worked.
hash_6daceb5ebedfe3df: ^1Bruno: ^7Will this end up in one of your adventure books?
hash_6dacec5ebedfe592: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sorry I said you were useless, Diego. Or maybe I just thought it.
hash_6dc87f1636d34cdc: ^1Shaw: ^7I honestly hadn't realized how angry you were - and still are, Scarlett.     I don't think your Dad did either.

hash_6e192f7109e77cf1: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you sure you are a real scientist Shaw?     I'm starting to worry that your 'brain' was never really there.
hash_6e1a5f44fd3e8053: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw - If what we are experiencing is truly some kind of extreme hallucination...    Then why does every touch and every breath feel exactly like it does in the real world?
hash_6e20b5e2ef29fd76: ^1Shaw: ^7This is just a piece of nothing!    ...unless...it's actually a piece of something.
hash_6e20b8e2ef2a028f: ^1Diego: ^7I'm sure this is just a piece to a larger puzzle.
hash_6e214d34708e5079: ^1Shaw: ^7So help me, I'm taking a shine to that little bugger!
hash_6e214f34708e53df: ^1Bruno: ^7To be so small, with such a fire inside... No wonder he talks so much.
hash_6e215034708e5592: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least he's useful, the sexist little shit.
hash_6e6527512b8db9e0: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to pull a Thomas Hardy and get far from this madding crowd.
hash_6e652c512b8dc25f: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a bad spot -- and getting worse by the second.
hash_6e652e512b8dc5c5: ^1Diego: ^7I have been surrounded before, but jumping out the window in my underwear is not an option this time.
hash_6e78400d3beb9e5b: ^1Shaw: ^7Are we given weapons familiar to our time period? If I were a caveman, would I receive a club?!
hash_6e78430d3beba374: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least we're not stuck with swords and spears.
hash_6e78450d3beba6da: ^1Diego: ^7This ought to make me popular with that bloodthirsty crowd.
hash_6e78460d3beba88d: ^1Bruno: ^7I feel like I am locked in a vicious cycle. Perhaps I always have been.
hash_6eed738473df5636: ^1Bruno: ^7My friends, do not let me become like this poor creature.
hash_6ef2e16a1e9ad2eb: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooof!    The weight discrepancy between 'no ammo' and 'all the ammo' is always a surprise to my poor back.
hash_6ef2e46a1e9ad804: ^1Scarlett: ^7Stock back up, get back to it.
hash_6ef2e66a1e9adb6a: ^1Diego: ^7Muchas gracias, wall. A loaded gun is a happy gun.
hash_6ef2e76a1e9add1d: ^1Bruno: ^7I suppose I could just buy a new weapon...but I have grown fond of this one.
hash_6efb815d5e827f21: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't mean to be a bother, but if any of you could spare a moment, I'd rather not bleed out in this stinking coliseum!
hash_6efb825d5e8280d4: ^1Diego: ^7The important thing at times like this is to learn from your mistakes.     And also not to die.
hash_6efb835d5e828287: ^1Bruno: ^7This was careless of me. And we cannot afford to be careless today.
hash_6efb845d5e82843a: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is bullshit! I am not done, you hear me? I am not done!
hash_6f2a66471a056270: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, the perfect weapon for a man who can't aim to begin with.
hash_6f2a6b471a056aef: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well, I've got my trench-broom. Time to start sweeping...
hash_6f2a6c471a056ca2: ^1Bruno: ^7This should do the job nicely.    Actually, it will be the opposite of "nice."
hash_6f2a6d471a056e55: ^1Diego: ^7"Boom!" It is one of my favorite sounds. Especially in 12-gauge.
hash_6f5d34fb6ad41a49: ^1Shaw: ^7Another big, growly sod. Is it me, or do they look a bit like Kaiser Wilhelm?
hash_6f5d35fb6ad41bfc: ^1Diego: ^7We must be doing something right. They are sending more big guys.
hash_6f5d36fb6ad41daf: ^1Bruno: ^7Another shock trooper. They must be committing their reserves.
hash_6f5d37fb6ad41f62: ^1Scarlett: ^7Another brawler with pointy knife-hands. 'Cause one's never enough.
hash_6f61ad771eb5c9ee: ^1Bruno: ^7All things have a place. We must find yours, little piece.
hash_6f61af771eb5cd54: ^1Shaw: ^7That's not where I left you. Wait, did I ever have you??
hash_6f79f73a665c2b3e: ^1Shaw: ^7Goodness, Bruno! I do believe you were the last thing to go through its mind.
hash_6f79fa3a665c3057: ^1Diego: ^7Did I see you crack a smile there, Bruno? Hey, I'm not judging...
hash_6f91ef262ce51f9e: ^1Shaw: ^7Questions, questions, where does the weapon go? How is it changed? Why is it changed? Do I need answers to this questions? Am I just creating more questions? Etcetera, etcetera... etcetera.
hash_6f91f1262ce52304: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not know what is behind this mechanism, but we are fortunate to have it.
hash_6f91f4262ce5281d: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's no rational way to explain how it does this, so I'm not even going to try.

hash_6fa47366aadc5368: ^1Scarlett: ^7Real funny, box. And it just gets funnier. Every. Damn. Time.
hash_6fa47566aadc56ce: ^1Diego: ^7I am no stranger to fleeting relationships. Though I am usually the one doing the "fleeting."
hash_6fa47666aadc5881: ^1Bruno: ^7Who -- or what -- ordered your withdrawal from the area, box?
hash_6fa47866aadc5be7: ^1Shaw: ^7No doubt you've buggered off to some out of the way section of this cursed coliseum.
hash_6fc92ab8b9c86620: ^1Shaw: ^7I tried to help. At least I think I did...    Sometimes.    Now and then.    I did help didn't I?
hash_700f6fb6a7aa3978: ^1Bruno: ^7There is acid in this cauldron. I will never forgot the odor. It is... very effective.
hash_700f70b6a7aa3b2b: ^1Diego: ^7A cauldron filled with acid? At last I face a villain with some imagination!
hash_700f72b6a7aa3e91: ^1Scarlett: ^7Whew, yep! I've been around Shaw enough to know that's how acid smells.
hash_700f75b6a7aa43aa: ^1Shaw: ^7The cauldron-full-of-acid ploy?    Shenanigans! I don't care what bloody century this is, that's my bit! I own the patent.
hash_702e367266a086a3: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, splendid, it's a good job we're running about the place shooting pigeons for shitting up the marble, and not facing a HORDE OF UNDEAD CANNIBALS!
hash_702e3b7266a08f22: ^1Diego: ^7Contrary to rumor, I do not go *spraying* my ammunition here and there. It is important to be... selective.
hash_702e3c7266a090d5: ^1Bruno: ^7So we aim for the heads. Easy enough.

hash_709552ec96f9614e: ^1Bruno: ^7See that gas? Steer clear of it.
hash_709553ec96f96301: ^1Diego: ^7Ay, dios, that smell--! Bruno, was that you?
hash_709554ec96f964b4: ^1Shaw: ^7Lovely. I always wondered what it's like to fight inside a septic tank.
hash_70beeeb7175ca6f3: ^1Shaw: ^7Just call me a ball of sunshine!
hash_70bef3b7175caf72: ^1Diego: ^7Come on in, chupacarnes! Mi casa es su casa!
hash_70bef4b7175cb125: ^1Bruno: ^7I am a bright spot in a sea of death.
hash_70cfb2b2860f5ad9: ^1Shaw: ^7They broke it? But how? They're so...fleshy. And my shield was the opposite of fleshy!
hash_70cfb3b2860f5c8c: ^1Diego: ^7My shield--! And here I thought Bulls were supposed to be strong...
hash_70cfb4b2860f5e3f: ^1Bruno: ^7You beasts will regret destroying my shield.
hash_710531ce6bfa48c8: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to claim your reward or press ^3[{+melee}]^7 to reject it
hash_7110fa08628d485a: ^1Shaw: ^7To be perfectly honest, I was a little preoccupied with the massive occult ritual unfolding around us... The last thing I was interested in was the floor!
hash_7111196d8c0cc38d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Of course fire burns us and not them! Because screw the laws of chemistry, that's why!
hash_713dc2c52bbf6196: ^1Shaw: ^7This, my friends, is what happens when your concentration is broken. Or never existed to begin with.
hash_713dc4c52bbf64fc: ^1Bruno: ^7Damn it, Bruno, your friends, they are counting on you.
hash_713dc5c52bbf66af: ^1Diego: ^7This is a sign from above. "Life is precious, Diego. Now, get up and take it from your enemies."
hash_713dc7c52bbf6a15: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I die here, do I really die? Are we even really here?      I'm in no hurry to find out.
hash_71957a2d74c64169: ^1Shaw: ^7If this is all just a fantasy, then it's a bloody good one, innit?
hash_71957b2d74c6431c: ^1Diego: ^7I hope they can see this from the cheap seats because Diego Necalli is putting on a show!
hash_71957c2d74c644cf: ^1Bruno: ^7Into violent darkness I descend, because only through darkness will we survive.
hash_71b34d719b93a98e: ^1Shaw: ^7Panthera Tigris mortuus. That's Latin for, "pain in the arse."
hash_71cf7acc27461750: ^1Bruno: ^7Ah, "la petite mort." This term is usually said in a different context.
hash_71cf7bcc27461903: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, I like these. Compact and vicious. A winning combination.
hash_71cf7dcc27461c69: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, darlin', we don't want to keep our friends waiting.
hash_71cf80cc27462182: ^1Shaw: ^7Madman with a machine gun, coming through...
hash_7206f85020918733: ^1Scarlett: ^7Look alive, Necalli! You're about to get dogpiled!
hash_7206f950209188e6: ^1Bruno: ^7In your dime novel, does Diego get swarmed and ripped to pieces? No?    Then move your derriere!
hash_7206fb5020918c4c: ^1Shaw: ^7You're meant to be killing them, Diego, not forming a rugby scrum!

hash_723d68e5659a4101: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh, la la! Such a magnificent weapon!
hash_723d6ae5659a4467: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that is absolutely wizard! Again! Again!
hash_728005b53bc10efb: ^1Shaw: ^7Just when I think I'm getting good at this, the big soldier-boy goes and shows me up.
hash_72800ab53bc1177a: ^1Diego: ^7Come now, Bruno, smile! Be proud of that head-shot!
hash_7281272d3513ca44: ^1Scarlett: ^7When this is over, I am keeping this thing!
hash_72812a2d3513cf5d: ^1Bruno: ^7I am not worthy of this weapon, but that will not save you.
hash_7299f3ce0b85ad80: ^1Shaw: ^7Positively wonderful...I think. That was good, right?
hash_7299f9ce0b85b7b2: ^1Bruno: ^7This success is but a momentary joy.
hash_7299face0b85b965: ^1Diego: ^7Muy bien. Which - in case you did not know - is Spanish for "very good."
hash_72e20365f5969e68: ^1Bruno: ^7It looks like that one brought Hell with him.
hash_72e20965f596a89a: ^1Shaw: ^7I see you, hot-stuff. Just keep your distance.
hash_7385d00e727340bc: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, at least it was a swift death.
hash_7385d10e7273426f: ^1Diego: ^7The Dragon's kiss is a thing of beauty, no?
hash_74021da2d817bae8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hate crowds. And walking corpses. And getting torn to pieces...
hash_74021fa2d817be4e: ^1Diego: ^7I give one of these monstros a little loose change, and look what happens.
hash_740220a2d817c001: ^1Bruno: ^7You are like a pack of dogs trying to bring down a bull. The bull will not cooperate.

hash_743c2c009d3350e4: ^1Diego: ^7Keep your distance, chupacarnes. This will not end well for you.
hash_743c2d009d335297: ^1Bruno: ^7The only thing more dangerous than cornering a good man...is cornering me.
hash_743c2e009d33544a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Never did like being the center of attention.
hash_74584810859b7a28: ^1Bruno: ^7Reward me all you want. It will not save you.
hash_74584910859b7bdb: ^1Diego: ^7It seems the gods favor Diego. And, really, who can blame them?

hash_748ab9a3fd8a27cb: |1Shaw: ^7Let's clear out these moaners before the others get past the barricades.
hash_748abca3fd8a2ce4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Go, hammers! Build us some breathing room!
hash_748abea3fd8a304a: ^1Diego: ^7I once killed a corrupt judge with a hammer. "Objection overruled!" Ha!
hash_748abfa3fd8a31fd: ^1Bruno: ^7A carpenter once owed my boss money. I smashed his hands with his own hammer.    That is it. End of story.
hash_74b7a5c00559f49e: ^1Shaw: ^7Oi! Pokey! Come here and scratch my back!
hash_74b7a7c00559f804: ^1Bruno: ^7Did this one fight in the arena? Some famous champion reduced to mindless fury?
hash_74b7a8c00559f9b7: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, my jumping, stabbing amigo. Come to Diego and end your pain.
hash_74b7aac00559fd1d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Another mad gladiator. Like it or not, the fight's coming to us.
hash_74bf813a3215cc90: ^1Diego: ^7Let it not be said that Diego Necalli is not a sophisticated killer...    With un aficion for double negatives.
hash_74bf823a3215ce43: ^1Bruno: ^7I may be un sauvage, but I am an efficient sauvage.
hash_74bf833a3215cff6: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a fine bit of engineering.     Maybe I'll take it apart after this whole "nightmare trip from hell" thing.
hash_74bf883a3215d875: ^1Shaw: ^7You mean I have to choose my targets?! I should name them too, then shall I?    This one's Barry, this one's Nigel- oh and look, there's Theodore! "Theo, you rascal, how's the missus?" "Oh you mean Martha? You've just shot her head clean off!"    MARTHA!!!
hash_74cf5a7687f4cf83: ^1Scarlett: ^7I swear I'm gonna catch that axe and shove it up your...
hash_7502985be3dec873: ^1Shaw: ^7Zombie plus sunlight equals dead zombie. That's just science!
hash_75029d5be3ded0f2: ^1Diego: ^7And now you have seen the light.
hash_756891f8e9b19c50: Arena to Danu Tower Gate Opened!
hash_75be87b6fa91e5a9: ^1Bruno: ^7There is no denying your skill, Diego. No matter how badly you make me want to.
hash_75be89b6fa91e90f: ^1Shaw: ^7Damn it all, why must Diego make it look so easy?
hash_75da79c04d08521b: ^1Shaw: ^7Finally, someone else is silencing these shamblers! Tally-ho, Scarlett!
hash_75da7ec04d085a9a: ^1Diego: ^7Tell me, Scarlett -- do you aim for their heads, or their faces?     Because one is smart. The other is just...vindictive.
hash_75da7fc04d085c4d: ^1Bruno: ^7Your father fought well, Scarlett, but he did not hold a candle to you!
hash_7690d99b2f867985: ^1Diego: ^7Let's show the crowd a good time, shall we?
hash_76f4ba9cb6ba8459: ^1Shaw: ^7You bastards in the stalls - You think this is fun?! Why don't you come down here and have a go - Get your hands all covered in blood and dung?!
hash_77092569739a5b39: ^1Shaw: ^7Now I know why tigers are so rare. Bloody Romans...
hash_77092769739a5e9f: ^1Bruno: ^7One less tiger. I am sure they'll make more.
hash_7720426ad7e790c6: ^1Shaw: ^7That's right, maggot-men! Come to Uncle Stanton and get your just desserts.
hash_7720446ad7e7942c: ^1Bruno: ^7If I possessed this as a younger man, half of Paris would be dead.
hash_7720456ad7e795df: ^1Diego: ^7The power of the Viper is almost unfair.     Who am I kidding? It is completely unfair!
hash_7733f4a3a3a53b07: ^1Bruno: ^7I will return the favor -- though I hope it won't be needed.
hash_774a3877df6ff6de: ^1Shaw: ^7A man my age shouldn't play with toys. But, oh, what glorious toys...
hash_774a3a77df6ffa44: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not relish violence, but, Lord, am I about to dish it out...
hash_774a3d77df6fff5d: ^1Scarlett: ^7All right, you walking stiffs, come meet my two best friends.
hash_779d9f463224daa8: ^1Shaw: ^7I always wanted to see a real, live tiger. Still haven't seen one.
hash_779da5463224e4da: ^1Bruno: ^7It's not your fault, kitten. Someone is using us all.
hash_779da6463224e68d: ^1Diego: ^7Is your trainer here somewhere? I would like to have a word...
hash_77bd07afdb58abd9: Danu Basement to Tunnel Gate Opened!
hash_77d33203258f768e: ^1Bruno: ^7Scarlett?! Shaw?! Anyone, really, except for Diego...?!
hash_77d33303258f7841: ^1Diego: ^7My friends, now is your chance! You can tell everyone you saved the world's greatest spy!
hash_77d33403258f79f4: ^1Shaw: ^7Anyone care to help out your dear uncle Stan? Hello? Anyone?!
hash_780306c1ff28cf69: ^1Shaw: ^7It's nothing personal, fleshie --just the cost of doing business.
hash_780308c1ff28d2cf: ^1Bruno: ^7I understand the joy Diego gets from this, even if I do not share it.
hash_780309c1ff28d482: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why use ten bullets when one gets it done?
hash_780e29b91b470dce: ^1Diego: ^7No need to say, "Thank you," senorita. But it would not hurt...much.
hash_780e2ab91b470f81: ^1Bruno: ^7Say nothing, Scarlett. It is an honor to be of assistance.
hash_780e2cb91b4712e7: ^1Shaw: ^7You look like me on an average day. No offense.

hash_7836ea1fb80fae88: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll take any good news I can get.
hash_7836ec1fb80fb1ee: ^1Diego: ^7De nada, my friends! I did it all for you!
hash_7836ef1fb80fb707: ^1Shaw: ^7It'd be nice if we could keep that up.
hash_78483516e0629eb1: ^1Shaw: ^7Up and at 'em, deary. We've still got work to do.
hash_78483616e062a064: ^1Diego: ^7Lying in a pool of blood is not a good look for you.
hash_78483716e062a217: ^1Bruno: ^7On your feet, my friend. We will get through this together.
hash_78517b5908df8647: ^1Scarlett: ^7This scorpion isn't... indigenous, is it?      Best not turn over any rocks.
hash_786a8f4eb8d9e24a: ^1Shaw: ^7It's heavy to swing, but when it connects: bliss!
hash_78cf46f36b436ade: ^1Bruno: ^7As ever, I am the heart of the maelstrom.
hash_78cf48f36b436e44: ^1Shaw: ^7Is everything spinning, or is it just me?
hash_78f9e44860a02890: ^1Bruno: ^7Come on, old man. We still have to visit that absinthe bar you keep telling me about.
hash_78f9e54860a02a43: ^1Diego: ^7Every spy needs his sidekick. Preferably alive.
hash_78f9e74860a02da9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Get back in the fight, Shaw. We can't do this without you.
hash_7984456c5f02cca2: ^1Diego: ^7You're an expert on ancient languages Shaw - did you notice the writings carved upon the floor when we arrived?
hash_798f29ffa9e1b17c: ^1Scarlett: ^7It'd be nice if something went right today!!
hash_798f2bffa9e1b4e2: ^1Diego: ^7Who did that? That was not me.
hash_798f2cffa9e1b695: ^1Bruno: ^7We must do better. We must be better.
hash_79cb73f346a68dba: Break off &&1 pieces of Gladiator Armor
hash_79dc0edb309d40a1: ^1Scarlett: ^7The enemy of my enemy is still a little pain in the rear.

hash_7aa36df20560833b: ^1Bruno: ^7How many giants with axes can this place throw at us?
hash_7aa373f205608d6d: ^1Shaw: ^7Hey! Didn't we just kill that hefty bloke with the axes?
hash_7aa4491ddc90f220: ^1Shaw: ^7May the wind be ever at your back, and my hammer in your face!
hash_7aa44f1ddc90fc52: ^1Bruno: ^7Step into the god-storm! Let Bruno release you!
hash_7aa4501ddc90fe05: ^1Diego: ^7I wear this storm like other men wear a topcoat.
hash_7ae9524ea123768e: ^1Shaw: ^7I hate you, I hate you, I hate you!
hash_7ae9554ea1237ba7: ^1Diego: ^7Ahhh, we all have regrets, don't we amigo?
hash_7ae9574ea1237f0d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ugh, am I bleeding?     Oh. He's fucking bleeding...
hash_7b0c009d7f9d3af8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ho ho! Wonder what kind of yield we're working with here...     Send in the guinea pigs!
hash_7b0c059d7f9d4377: ^1Shaw: ^7Umm... Which part of this thing is the business end? Anyone?    Just pull the trigger and hope for the best then, shall I?
hash_7b180a50b8bf0bf8: ^1Diego: ^7Why am I the one picking this up? This is not the best use of my talents.
hash_7b181150b8bf17dd: ^1Shaw: ^7There it is! The key to fame and glory!    Or, you know, nothing.
hash_7b70b7e05f6e2e60: ^1Scarlett: ^7Get off your duff, Diego. This fight ain't over.
hash_7b70bae05f6e3379: ^1Bruno: ^7If only I could leave your smart mouth to die...
hash_7b70bce05f6e36df: ^1Shaw: ^7Off your bum, mate. You'll feel better once you kill a few more fleshies.
hash_7b872cd695b7476f: ^1Shaw: ^7Aw, look: they all want to embrace our Latin lover...     Oh, no! Run, Diego, run!
hash_7bd4a45891699633: ^1Shaw: ^7Ooh  , perhaps they'll carry me off on a litter... I'm sure that couldn't get 'lost in translation'.
hash_7bd4a75891699b4c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't go building a statue of me now! Seriously don't.
hash_7bd4a95891699eb2: ^1Diego: ^7Listen to them up there! Imagine the after party...
hash_7bd4aa589169a065: ^1Bruno: ^7You shout that I am the best?! You have seen NOTHING!
hash_7c25acea6b5d810f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay you dumb stumbling cadavers - You're all headed for the morgue.      This time - Permanently.
hash_7c26038b5a3d658b: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's getting like a circus in here.
hash_7c26048b5a3d673e: ^1Bruno: ^7More tigers? Now they are just messing with me.
hash_7c26058b5a3d68f1: ^1Diego: ^7My lady-friend Griselda used to call me "Tiger."      Now she calls me a dog. Story of my life.
hash_7c26068b5a3d6aa4: ^1Shaw: ^7"London man eaten by dead tiger." I suppose there are worse obituaries...
hash_7c301d792351b458: ^1Bruno: ^7I take no joy in slaughter, but heaven help me, I am good at it.
hash_7c301e792351b60b: ^1Diego: ^7Is anyone keeping count? Because I am pretty certain I'm winning.
hash_7c3020792351b971: ^1Scarlett: ^7The venue may be different, but they die the same way.
hash_7c3023792351be8a: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't know how long my luck will hold up, but it is definitely holding.
hash_7c5551f0b370f5c6: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm a lover, not a fighter! Can't anyone see that?    I will take the bullets, though.
hash_7c5553f0b370f92c: ^1Bruno: ^7Free ammunition for me is like open bar for an alcoholic.
hash_7c5556f0b370fe45: ^1Scarlett: ^7From the world - right into my weapon.
hash_7c86049065e7eac4: ^1Bruno: ^7Finesse et brutalite. The knife is like France, mes amis.
hash_7c86059065e7ec77: ^1Diego: ^7Ay! How dare you soil my nice new armor!
hash_7c86079065e7efdd: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is almost starting to feel normal!
hash_7cd84e0953a493cc: ^1Diego: ^7I suppose if fantasma is too busy, I will buy my own ammo.
hash_7cd84f0953a4957f: ^1Bruno: ^7There is no getting around it: if we wish to survive this nightmare, we need the bullets.
hash_7cd8500953a49732: ^1Scarlett: ^7Glad these walls work the same as on the ship. I need all the ammo I can get today.
hash_7d2290fee33a8eeb: ^1Shaw: ^7This arena isn't quite as splattered with Prima Materia as the ship.     They just knew how to manipulate it better back, well, whenever this is.
hash_7d2293fee33a9404: ^1Scarlett: ^7This Priest... he's putting us through the ringer. But he's not trying to kill us. I think he wants us to win.
hash_7d2295fee33a976a: ^1Diego: ^7I don't know what exactly we inhaled in that bowl, but this... it is far more real than anything I could have dreamt up.
hash_7d2296fee33a991d: ^1Bruno: ^7What was that? Did anyone else hear a voice? Inside your head, I mean....
hash_7d6ef6c095315d1e: ^1Diego: ^7Honestly. When was the last time you brushed your teeth?
hash_7d6ef7c095315ed1: ^1Bruno: ^7The monstre is dead, but his stench lives on.
hash_7d6ef9c095316237: ^1Shaw: ^7Poor thing. All that vomit. Lactose intolerant, yes?
hash_7dad1a9b3e4a1663: ^1Shaw: ^7Look at him go! Crawling legless on all fours -- I mean, twos!
hash_7dad1d9b3e4a1b7c: ^1Scarlett: ^7As if these freaks weren't making a mess before...
hash_7dad1f9b3e4a1ee2: ^1Diego: ^7Stop it with that crawling. At least die with dignity.
hash_7dad209b3e4a2095: ^1Bruno: ^7You crawl with more passion than I have ever known in my life...    Perhaps I should try to be happier...

hash_7ddc63f6d7fc1fc4: ^1Diego: ^7Your complexions are terrible! May I recommend a chemical peel?
hash_7ddc64f6d7fc2177: ^1Bruno: ^7Another place, another century... but the smell of burning flesh remains the same.
hash_7ddc65f6d7fc232a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw always said to handle acid with care...      He would know.
hash_7df0de3a79c77559: ^1Shaw: ^7The, ah, water-elementals...purify the others. That makes sense -- as much as anything does tonight.
hash_7df0df3a79c7770c: ^1Diego: ^7Ah. I see! The blue ones give strength to the others. See their eyes?
hash_7df0dff67c9b6460: ^1Scarlett: ^7Now's our chance! Put down as many as you can!
hash_7df0e03a79c778bf: ^1Bruno: ^7Tres ingenieux. The water-monstres reinforce the others -- like undead medics!
hash_7df0e13a79c77a72: ^1Scarlett: ^7Kill the blue ones! They make the others stronger!

hash_7e0664a02f9e1234: ^1Shaw: ^7They're converging on you, Delacroix. It's like you make your own gravity.
hash_7e1e5be29e70971e: ^1Bruno: ^7Know this, Box: it is unwise to anger me.
hash_7e1e5ce29e7098d1: ^1Diego: ^7No, no, no. Why on earth would you  leave Diego? It is...unfathomable!

hash_7e44aa9fb2f5ab40: ^1Scarlett: ^7For as far back as I can remember, he filled my head with his 'tall tales'.       I was so indoctrinated that I actually believed them.

hash_7f19e92fcfa41e98: ^1Bruno: ^7Keep your games, and your gods, and your Chaos!    I am finished here, wake me up!
hash_7f19ea2fcfa4204b: ^1Diego: ^7I admit, that was a good challenge! Stuff of legends, monsters and men.    Let's get what we need and go... Vamonos, eh?!
hash_7f19ec2fcfa423b1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay, that is it! Let's button up this trial and snap out of this nightmare...     Now please.
